title: Environmental Designer
raw_description:
Atelier Ten is an innovative multidisciplinary firm of building services engineers environmental design consultants, and lighting designers focused on delivering high-quality building services design and sustainable design consultancy within the built environment sector. We aim to deliver highly sustainable design solutions based on the touchstones of environmental integrity, economic viability, and pragmatic engineering solutions. These principles are embedded in our collaborative and creative approach to problem solving and efficient resource utilisation.

We seek to reduce complexity. A core objective is to meet the needs of our clients by developing well-integrated buildings with simple systems that work with natural laws of physics to provide comfort while reducing energy consumption and contributing back to the greater environment. At Atelier Ten, we take a wider role in the design process than traditional building services engineers and consultants: in particular we work with the design team to integrate environmental moderation and control into the fabric of the building. From this improved basis we develop efficient and well-integrated building services systems to provide comfortable and efficient internal environments.

Atelier Ten has a history of innovation. Founded in 1990, we are not afraid to challenge conventional thinking. Our environmental ethos is not an additive one; rather we strive to make buildings do more with less by working from basic principles and employing rigorous analysis. Our success is built on the expert delivery of innovative and sustainable engineering solutions.

To support Atelier Ten’s continued success. We have established, and continue to maintain, efficient and effective business knowledge and quality management systems in order to provide our clients - in both the private and public sector - with first-class services covering the full range of design, construction, building services, engineering and maintenance disciplines, and by providing first-class project development and management services including an award-winning design solutions consultancy service.

The post holder will be responsible for supporting work on a range of projects assisting the delivery of environmental and sustainability advice on projects for both internal clients and external clients. This will involve providing consultancy on environmental design, sustainability benchmarking/implementation, building energy optimisation, daylight & shading design, sustainable systems, materials and waste. This consultancy will be demonstrated through sound analytics including building physics.

Projects will range from masterplanning to detailed design of specific buildings across all scales and locations of the globe. Using industry benchmark and internal standards, the post holder will ensure not only the timely delivery of accurate project information but also provide a point of contact between engineering staff and the other members of the environmental team.

Key Accountabilities:

Technical ability

  • Coordinate, complete and ensure Green Rating projects in any given green rating scheme (Green Mark, LEED etc.)
  • Complete simulations such as energy modelling, CFD, daylighting etc.
  • Actively committed to pursuing CPD of all relevant disciplines
  • Demonstrate reasonable knowledge of environmental design, sustainability benchmarking/implementation, building energy optimisation, daylight & shading design, sustainable systems, materials, waste and building physics
  • Actively committed to developing specialist skills in one, or more, disciplines
  • Demonstrate an understanding of Atelier Ten’s approach
  • Able to provide accurate calculations and informative design options in relevant disciplines
  • Deliver technical solutions in accordance with client brief
  • Help facilitate the development of client brief by supporting other members of their team
  • Willingness to develop an awareness and understanding of other disciplines

Project management

  • Liaise with client, architect and other members of the internal or external design team
  • Can effectively co-ordinate with in-house engineers, the environmental teamand members of the graphics team
  • Can develop appropriate design, proposals or analysis within the agreed time scale
  • Maintain overview of project work and provide updates as and when required to line manager/project manager

Interpersonal Skills

  • Appreciates the need for effective liaison between Atelier Ten, clients and architects
  • Report any feedback or issues concerning the project from clients
  • Foster positive relationships within Atelier Ten

Requirements:

  • Sustainability, Engineering, Architectural or related disciplines
  • Bachelor’s or higher degree in a field related to environmental building design, architecture, building services engineering, and/ or building science
  • Fresh graduates are welcome to apply. We are seeking applicants with zero to three-years’ professional experience in a sustainability consulting practice or related design firm or within an engineering environment.
  • LEED AP in BD+C (plus point)
  • GMM/GMP (plus point)
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, AutoCAD, Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, InDesign), and Rhino is highly desired
  • In addition, skills with such software as Revit, “R,” Grasshopper, Ladybug/Honeybee, Radiance, eQuest, EnergyPlus, IES, D3, or general programming or data visualization skill would be of interest
  • Solid interest in environmental and energy-efficient design
  • Have undertaken a wide variety of project work
  • Practical knowledge of project work coupled with an understanding of project management tools
  • Understanding of the deliverables associated with projects within the public and private sector
  • Understanding of project co-ordination
  • Team player
  • Appreciates the need for the application of consistent standards and metrics

Skills

  • Good understanding on Green rating schemes such as Green Mark, LEED etc.
  • Manage ESD projects independently
  • Good understanding in simulations e.g. energy modelling, CFD, daylight & glare modelling.
  • Ability to work under limited supervision
  • Ability to prioritise work loads
  • Good writing skills for producing written reports
  • Effective IT skills for producing relevant material, including knowledge and application of building physics packages
  • Demonstrated graphic and verbal communication skills

Qualifications


Sustainability, Engineering, Architectural or related disciplines

title: Software Developer
raw_description:
About the role

ECICS LIMITED' is seeking a talented Software Developer to join our dynamic team on a contract basis. As a Software Developer, you will play a crucial role in developing and enhancing our cutting-edge software solutions. This is an exciting opportunity to contribute to the strategic initiatives of our organisation and make a tangible impact through your technical expertise.


Roles & Responsibilities:

  • Write clean, scalable, and efficient code in languages such as Java, Python, JavaScript, or others.
  • Participate in all phases of the software development lifecycle, including planning, design, implementation, testing, and maintenance.
  • Debug and resolve technical issues, ensuring software functionality and performance.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams including designers, QA testers, product managers, and other developers.
  • Integrate software components and third-party programs.
  • Maintain documentation for code, processes, and systems.
  • Stay up to date with emerging technologies and industry best practices.

  • At least 1 year of relevant experience
  • Willing to start with a 12-month contract role with the possibility to convert to permanent after demonstrating capabilities
  • Prior experience in an Insurance firm/Financial institutions would be an added advantage
  • Proficiency in one or more programming languages (e.g., Java, Python, JavaScript)
  • Experience in maintaining legacy systems or transitioning legacy code to modern stacks
  • Experience in secure coding practices and knowledge of data security principals
  • Familiarity with database technologies (SQL, NoSQL)

  • Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
  • Strong demonstrated interests in Agentic AI
  • Able to work with a fast-changing product while finding product-market fit
  • Good communication and teamwork abilities

title: Design Verification Engineer
raw_description:
Position Overview:

Black Sesame Technologies is seeking motivated and detail-oriented individuals to join our team as Engineer, Design Verification. This is a great opportunity to be part of a fast-paced environment working on next-generation automotive SoCs. You will be involved in developing industry-grade verification platforms and methodologies to ensure our chips meet the highest functional and quality standards. We're looking for candidates who are curious, self-driven, and passionate about hardware verification.


Responsibilities:

  • Develop verification platforms and test cases using SystemVerilog and UVM based on verification plans.
  • Promote and implement Formal Property Verification (FPV) for relevant design modules.
  • Perform RTL and gate-level simulation, execute regression tests, and debug failures.
  • Analyze code and functional coverage to identify and close coverage gaps.
  • Contribute ideas and improvements to enhance verification methodologies and processes.


Qualification/ Requirements:

  • Education: Master’s or PhD degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or related fields.
  • Experience: Internship or project experience in chip design/verification preferred. Open to fresh graduates with relevant coursework or research experience.
  • Programming Skills: Proficiency in SystemVerilog and scripting languages such as Python, Perl, or Shell.
  • Problem-Solving: Strong analytical and debugging skills; ability to work through complex technical challenges.
  • Teamwork: Collaborative mindset with strong communication skills and willingness to learn in a fast-paced team environment.

title: Treasury Executive (Funding Support)
raw_description:

This role is responsible for daily capital operations, payments, bank liaison, funding partner documentation support, and capital ledger management. It is a key position within the Group’s Singapore Capital & Arbitrage Center.

Key Responsibilities

1. Daily Capital Operations

- Execute payments, remittances, and fund transfers

- Monitor daily balances and update capital ledgers

- Prepare banking documents and follow up funds status

- Assist in completing monthly funding reports and fund pool reports.

- Prepare KYC, certifications, and company documents

- Numerical sensitivity and attention to detail

3. Competencies

- Strong execution and responsibility

- Confidentiality and risk awareness

- Works well under time-sensitive tasks

4. Preferred

Candidates with banking work (internship) experience will be given priority.

title: Paralegal / Legal Executive
raw_description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Paralegal / Legal Executive to join our Private Wealth Practice team. The successful candidate will assist our lawyers with various private wealth and asset management matters, including legal research, document preparation, and translation.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Assist in legal research, and document preparation.
  • Manage the document review process by coordinating comments from multiple sources and incorporating modifications under supervision.
  • Prepare preliminary and other basic deal documents.
  • Coordinate and manage document review processes by liaising with internal stakeholders, fund administrators, trustees, tax advisors and other professional parties, and consolidate comments and revisions.
  • Assist in cross-border matters involving Singapore, China and other jurisdictions, including translating legal documents and correspondence between English and Mandarin Chinese, where required.
  • Ensure confidentiality and adhere to ethical standards in all aspects of work.
  • Perform other duties as assigned.

Qualifications & Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Law or above; legal training and qualification preferred.
  • Minimum of two years of paralegal experience in a law firm or in-house legal department preferred.
  • Excellent organizational and communication skills.
  • Proficiency in English is required. Working proficiency in Mandarin is required to communicate with Mandarin-speaking stakeholders and review or translate basic Chinese-language materials.
  • Meticulous, able to multitask, and ensure transaction timelines are met.
  • Ownership-driven and proactive, able to manage matters independently and push projects forward.
  • Proficiency in MS Word, Excel, and PowerPoint.

title: Graduate Trainee (Finance)
raw_description:
We are seeking enthusiastic Fresh Graduates to join our structured training development program. This entry level role is designed for University or Polytechnic graduates looking to kick start their careers with no prior experience in finance.

Job Responsibilities

  • Manage financial and investment portfolios for corporate (B2B) and individual (B2C) clients on Investment, Risk, and Asset Management.
  • Analyze financial markets and investment funds across asset classes including Equities, ETFs, Bonds, and Unit Trusts.
  • Provide integrated financial solutions focused on Wealth Preservation, Partnership Management, Estate Planning, and Business Succession Planning.

  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team setting
  • Academic qualification equivalent to one of the following:

Job Type

  • Entry level role. Full-time and part-time positions available.
  • Open to Career switchers, Undergraduates, and Fresh graduates with no prior finance or investment experience
  • Flexible working hours, work from home option available.

Other Information

  • Career advancement opportunities to senior executive and managerial roles
  • Comprehensive structured training program with one-on-one mentorship
  • Supportive and collaborative team culture promoting work-life balance
  • Performance-based incentives, bonuses, and incentivized overseas trips

title: Project Assistant
raw_description:
The project assistant will coordinate the schedule, budget, issues and risks of the project. It’s their job to ensure the project management framework is well organized and that it runs smoothly.

This can include communicating with various departments and customers in the organization to make sure everyone is on the same page.


Core responsibilities

  • Monitoring project progress and creating project status reports for projects manager, customers, and vendors.
  • Assisting with resource scheduling so that team members have the resources they need to complete their tasks.
  • Scheduling meetings and facilitating communication between the project manager and throughout the project life cycle
  • Managing project management documents such as the project plan, budget, schedule, or scope statement, as directed by the project manager.
  • Executing a variety of project management administrative tasks such as billing and bookkeeping
  • Support team members when implementing risk management strategies.
  • Cooperate and communicate effectively with project manager and other participants to aid and technical.
  • Review engineering deliverables and initiate appropriate corrective actions
  • Advanced MS office skills
  • Familiarity with rules, regulations, best practices, and performance standards
  • Ability to work with multiple discipline projects
  • Project management and supervision skills
  • Decision making ability and leadership skills
  • Time management and organization skills


Technical skills

  • Professional certificate/NITEC/Engineering degree/Diploma (Electrical/Mechanical/Building Services) or equivalent
  • At least 3-5 years minimum as Project Engineer working experience in the related field is required for this position or equivalent
  • Valid class 3 driving license

Softs Skills

  • Possess a good work attitude and must be meticulous organized reliable and able to handle work pressure well
  • Excellent oral and written communication skills with a good command of both spoken and written English
  • Solid organizational skills including attention to details and multitasking skills
  • Strong working knowledge of Microsoft office such as excels, words, PowerPoint and etc


Key deliverables

  • Fulfil customers satisfaction
  • Lay out consistent quality and service
  • Ownership in cost-effectiveness and profitable
  • Without fail comply with legal and regulatory requirements
  • Take responsibility to continually make improvement
  • Execute (quality/enriching/inspiring/productive/contribute) innovation
  • Keeping delivery on-time

title: Innovation Specialist
raw_description:
About Knovel:

At our core, our passion is to craft novel AI and technology solutions that will shape tomorrow. We deploy cutting-edge technology that builds on cloud computing to proliferate AI, data and analytics solutions tailored to drive innovation and transform businesses.

With our desire to push the boundaries of technology, we partner closely with our clients. Guiding their transformation with agility, we apply a structured technology transformation process attuned to their unique challenges.

At Knovel Engineering, we blend technology with creativity to build unique solutions tailored for our customers.


About the Role:

Drive and coordinate innovation efforts by working closely with stakeholders and technology providers to apply solutions to specific use cases. Match technology providers from our programs with potential partners and stakeholders, while actively contributing to other ongoing innovation programs and activities to strengthen the overall ecosystem.


Key Responsibilities

  • Coordinate with internal and external stakeholders to identify, scope, and drive application of technology solutions for targeted use cases.
  • Serve as the bridge between technology providers and potential adopters, facilitating partnerships and use case deployment.
  • Actively engage and support technology providers that pass through the center's programs, ensuring they are connected to relevant opportunities and stakeholders.
  • Design and manage innovation initiatives, contributing knowledge on emerging technologies, trends, and best practices.
  • Support the development and implementation of innovation program KPIs, tracking progress and outcomes across initiatives.
  • Build and nurture a strong network of startups, technology vendors, government agencies, and industry stakeholders to foster collaboration.
  • Prepare reports, concept notes, and presentations tailored to both technical and non-technical audiences.
  • Contribute actively to ongoing innovation programs, workshops, and events to strengthen engagement and visibility.
  • Undertake other ad-hoc innovation-related projects and assignments as required.

Qualifications

  • Degree or postgraduate degree in a relevant discipline.
  • Minimum of 2 years’ experience in stakeholder engagement, innovation management, technology adoption, or ecosystem development.
  • Proven ability to manage cross-functional collaborations and coordinate among diverse stakeholders.
  • Strong knowledge of emerging technologies, innovation practices, and their application in solving real-world challenges.
  • Excellent communication, interpersonal, and presentation skills; able to engage both technical and non-technical stakeholders effectively.
  • Results-driven, with strong organizational and project management skills.
  • Passionate about innovation, problem-solving, and building partnerships.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite.

Why you should apply:

  • Competitive remuneration and benefits.
  • Flat hierarchy with minimal bureaucracy.
  • Learning opportunities through courses, seminars, and conferences.
  • Be at the forefront of innovation and gain access to cutting-edge technologies.
  • Contribute to enhancing Singapore’s position as a thriving innovation hub.

title: Social Worker
raw_description:
At Rainbow Centre we envision a world where persons with disabilities are empowered and thriving in inclusive communities.

Our team of social workers uncovers and enables the strengths of persons with disabilities and their families through person centred planning and supports them in pursuit of their Good Life - where they are safe, healthy, engaged, connected, independent, included and heard.

We are looking for a Social Worker for our Special Education Schools. In considering if you should send us your CV for consideration, we like you to know that in addition to a degree in Social Work, it is far more important that you enjoy knowing and connecting with people of diverse abilities, uncovering possibilities and harnessing the power of communities.

Key Responsibilities

  • The social worker in our special schools brings to the educational process an understanding of the psychosocial concerns of families and the influences of family, community and cultural differences as they interact with the educational process.
  • The social worker will conduct assessments of client needs, provide counselling, support and crisis intervention and participate in programme and policy development.
  • The social worker works closely with families, social and community agencies and volunteers to strengthen the circles of care around our clients with disabilities.

Key Requirements

  • A Bachelor or Master's Degree in Social Work from a recognized university
  • Accredited Social Worker, or eligible for professional registration with the SASW
  • Experience working in a similar setting or with special needs client will be an advantage

Service is at the heart of RC’s purpose and we seek to serve our clients with respect, dedication and compassion, understanding that we are entrusted by society to serve with excellence and the highest ethical standards. Join us if you share our passion and values.

Key Responsibilities The social worker in our special schools brings to the educational process an understanding of the psychosocial concerns of families and the influences of family, community and cultural differences as they interact with the educational process. The social worker will conduct assessments of client needs, provide counselling, support and crisis intervention and participate in programme and policy development. The social worker works closely with families, social and community agencies and volunteers to strengthen the circles of care around our clients with disabilities. Key Requirements A Bachelor or Master's Degree in Social Work from a recognized university Accredited Social Worker, or eligible for professional registration with the SASW Experience working in a similar setting or with special needs client will be an advantage Service is at the heart of RC’s purpose and we seek to serve our clients with respect, dedication and compassion, understanding that we are entrusted by society to serve with excellence and the highest ethical standards. Join us if you share our passion and values.

title: Quantity Surveyor
raw_description:
Job Description


RE-CONCTRACT TENDER

  1. Source for tender of notice and attend site show round.
  2. Know the nature of tender and allocation of work before collecting of tender documents.
  3. Assist in taking off quantities and Bills of Quantities.
  4. Check quotation received according to specification requirement.
  5. Prepare cost comparison to management and submit for approval.
  6. Assist in the identification and engagement of good subcontractors / suppliers.
  7. Compilation of suppliers and subcontractors list with grading.
  8. Discuss with the management for the submission of tender at a date of fixed by the contracts manager / managing director before the closing date of tender (i.e. 4 days prior to tender closing date).

POST-CONTRACT ADMINISTRATION

  1. Verify and source for sub-contractors / suppliers and materials.
  2. Prepare letter of award.
  3. Attend site meeting (if required).
  4. Prepare monthly project progress claim.
  5. Check with site personnel and prepare variation order claim on monthly basis.
  6. Prepare and verify sub-contractors / suppliers progress claim.
  7. Attend to dispute arises due to claim & variation order on monthly basis.
  8. Ensure subcontractors & suppliers are awarded timely without jeopardizing the progress of work.
  9. Costs control between budget & expenditure.
  10. Control of overall project costs to ensure expenditure is 10% below budget.

Requirements

  1. Bachelor's degree in Quantity Surveying or equivalent.
  2. Entry level candidates are welcomed to apply.
  3. Good communication skill, meticulous and attentive.
  4. Able to work both independently and as a team.
  5. Willing to travel to various project site for site meeting as and when required.

Others information:

  1. Work location at Wood Square Tower 1.
  2. 5 days’ work week.

title: Digital Fundraising Executive
raw_description:
Company Overview

Glyph Community is a Singapore-registered IPC charity dedicated to supporting children from lower-income or vulnerable households, aged 5 to 12, through holistic weekend enrichment programs. Beyond fostering social, emotional, and intellectual growth through structured activities like arts, STEM, life skills, and wellness initiatives, Glyph Community now also focuses on uplifting the living standards of the families we serve.

Role Overview

We are hiring a Digital Fundraising Executive (Contract) to grow our online fundraising and donor engagement efforts starting January 2026. You will plan and manage digital campaigns, apply for fundraising grants, and support the charity in meeting its fundraising goals.

Roles and Responsibilities

  1. Plan and run digital fundraising campaigns on social media, crowdfunding sites, and email independently
  2. Write and design fundraising content to attract and retain donors
  3. Apply for relevant fundraising grants and assist in donor reporting
  4. Track and report campaign and donor data using Excel or other tools
  5. Support other fundraising or administrative tasks as assigned

Key Performance Indicators

  • Growth in total online donations and number of active donors
  • Number of campaigns and grant applications completed on time
  • Accuracy and timeliness of reporting and documentation
  • Exact metrics to be aligned on if shortlisted for interview

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field
  • Non-degree holders with relevant fundraising experience and demonstrated proficiencies will be considered
  • 1 to 3 years of experience in digital marketing, fundraising and/or content creation
  • Strong writing and communication skills
  • Proficient in design tools (Adobe PS / AI, Canva, Davinci Resolve, Capcut), social media tools (meta business suite), Microsoft Office (Words, Excel, PowerPoint) and CRM (HubSpot).
  • Organised, creative, and passionate about helping children and families

Application Process

As part of our selection process, shortlisted applicants are required to participate in a case study to assess their suitability for the role.

title: Cleaning Quality Control Executive
raw_description:
Job Description & Responsibilities:

  • Ensure all cleaning operations strictly follow company Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and industry standards
  • Conduct routine and random site inspections to assess cleanliness, hygiene standards, and staff performance
  • Maintain comprehensive records of inspection results, issues identified, and actions taken
  • Report service gaps and operational issues promptly to the Resident Manager and Operations Team
  • Collaborate with the Operations Team to implement corrective and preventive actions (CAPA)
  • Identify recurring issues and support continuous process improvements to enhance cleaning quality

  • Recommend and coordinate retraining sessions for cleaning staff when quality standards are not met
  • Participate in onboarding and training sessions for new cleaning personnel, focusing on quality standards
  • Investigate and document customer complaints, determine root causes, and recommend resolutions
  • Track and analyze trends in inspection data to propose improvements and reduce non-conformance rates
  • Ensure availability and proper use of cleaning materials and equipment as per standards
  • Support the evaluation and implementation of new cleaning tools, products, or technologies
  • Foster a culture of accountability and excellence in cleaning performance across all teams

Job Requirements:

  • Minimum Diploma holder; Fresh graduates are welcome to apply
  • Strong observational, reporting, and analytical skills
  • Bilingual preferred (spoken and written) to effectively communicate with diverse teams
  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel, Word, and PowerPoint
  • Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to work independently and as part of a team
  • Detail-oriented with a proactive approach to problem-solving

✨ Fresh graduates & career switchers welcome

✨ Training provided from Day 1

title: Marcom Executive
raw_description:
Our client is a well-established, reputable members-based institution in Singapore, recognised for its heritage, strong brand presence and high standards of service. With a diverse calendar of events and activities, the organisation places strong emphasis on member engagement, brand stewardship and meaningful communications.

Key Responsibilities

  • Support the planning and execution of marketing and communications initiatives across online and offline channels

  • Assist in creating and coordinating content for member communications, including EDMs, newsletters, website updates, mobile app content and printed materials

  • Support the promotion of club events, programmes and initiatives to drive member engagement and participation

  • Assist with corporate communications and brand messaging to ensure consistency across all touchpoints

  • Liaise with internal departments to gather information, coordinate timelines and support communication needs

  • Coordinate with external vendors and agencies (e.g. designers, printers, media partners) on assigned projects

  • Track basic campaign performance metrics and assist in preparing reports and post-campaign summaries

  • Diploma or Degree in Marketing, Communications, Mass Communications or a related discipline

  • Familiarity with digital channels such as EDM platforms, websites or social media is an advantage

  • Interest in hospitality, lifestyle, leisure or membership-based environments is a plus

  • Organised, proactive and able to manage multiple tasks in a structured environment

As a Marketing Intern at August Hair Salon, you will contribute to the salon’s brand growth by creating engaging digital content, supporting promotional campaigns, and enhancing customer engagement through social media and influencer activities.   • Demonstrated creativity and comfort using social media platforms for brand promotion
  • Responsible, proactive attitude with eagerness to learn and contribute to team goals
  • Effective communication and teamwork skills to collaborate with colleagues and stakeholders

title: Financial Advisor (Insurance) - Flexi Work + Mentoring + Training provided
raw_description:
Flexi Work Arrangements, Essential Financial Knowledge, Attractive Remuneration

We believe in providing a holistic approach in service to our clients, ensuring their needs are met and satisfied in our care. And we believe that it starts with us!


Join our team as a Financial Advisor and enjoy a flexible work setting, comprehensive training, support structure, together with market leading remuneration. This role is ideal for both fresh graduates and those seeking a mid-career switch. Connect with us and embark on a rewarding career in financial advisory


A Day in The Life of a Financial Advisor:

  • Client Networking: Establish and grow a robust client base through effective networking and prospecting strategies.
  • Financial Strategy Development: Analyze clients' financial situations and goals to create tailored financial strategies.
  • Insurance and Financial Advisory: Provide comprehensive advisory on insurance and financial planning, covering areas such as retirement, education, and investments, supported by our extensive product suite.
  • Financial Analysis: Presenting detailed financial summaries, investment reports, and income projections for clients.
  • Client Relationship Management: Maintain and strengthen client relationships through regular reviews and adjustments to financial plans based on life changes.

Benefits & Rewards:

  • 24-months Trainee Program: Provides monthly allowance + commission, supporting you in the first 24 months of your career.
  • Extensive Training and Support Structure: Regular workshops, training & sharing sessions within the agency and individual mentorship ensuring support along the way.
  • Flexi-Hybrid Work Setting: Enjoy a hybrid work setting with flexible work arrangements.
  • Attractive Rewards: We believe in 'work hard, play hard', with incentives for top performers & fun team-bonding events.
  • Market-leading Remuneration Structure: Market-leading remuneration package along with an attractive incentive system, including commissions, performance incentives, and up to 3 incentive trips a year.

Qualifications:

  • Singaporean / Singapore PR preferred
  • Minimum 21 years old with Polytechnic Diploma, GCE 'A' level Certification or Bachelor Degree in any field, as per MAS requirements.
  • Highly motivated with strong interpersonal skills

Apply now to find out more!

Join one of Singapore’s most dynamic investment firms as it expands its exclusive private client division, in partnership with global investment leaders BlackRock, Fidelity, and Schroders. Backed by a strong private equity heritage, the firm delivers institutional-grade strategies to high-net-worth and ultra-high-net-worth clients seeking access to opportunities typically reserved for large institutions. This position offers a rare platform to craft sophisticated investment solutions, foster enduring client relationships, and contribute to a fast-growing firm redefining wealth management in Asia.

Preferred

  • Recent graduates, Financial Advisors, Relationship Managers, Private Bankers welcomed.
  • A background in investment analysis, portfolio management, or a related field in a private bank, asset management firm, or multi-family office.
  • Demonstrable experience in constructing and managing multi-asset class portfolios, with exposure to equities, fixed income, and alternative investments.
  • Practical experience in interpreting and applying institutional-grade investment research from leading global asset managers to inform strategy.
  • Experience within private banking or wealth management, with a verifiable track record of managing and growing a portfolio of HNW/UHNW relationships. The role is further supported by a consistent stream of qualified leads from the firm's established corporate partnerships.
  • A background that demonstrates exceptional interpersonal skills and the professional gravitas required to build rapport with entrepreneurs, C-suite executives, and multi-generational families.
  • A proven ability to deliver a superior service experience, with outstanding communication skills and a meticulous attention to client service detail.

Required

  • Will need to obtain or posses minimum 4 MAS papers

  • Assist in preparing mechanical design drawings and layouts for data centre systems, including: HVAC / air-conditioning systems, Chilled water systems, Plumbing and fire protection systems

  • Coordinate with internal teams (electrical, architectural, civil) to ensure integrated design solutions.
  • Assist with design reviews and revisions based on project requirements.

  • Diploma or Degree in Mechanical Engineering or related field.
  • Fresh graduates are welcome (no prior experience required).
  • Basic knowledge of HVAC, plumbing, and building mechanical systems.
  • Familiarity with AutoCAD (Revit/BIM is a plus but not required).
  • Willingness to learn and work in a fast-paced project environment.
  • Good communication, teamwork, and problem-solving skills.

  • Familiarity with AutoCAD (Revit/BIM is a plus but not required).
  • Willingness to learn and work in a fast-paced project environment.
  • Good communication and teamwork skills.

title: Management Trainee
raw_description:
WHO WE ARE?
🔸 Well known Bubble Tea company
🔸 We are currently expanding our operations and are looking for Management Trainees with the potential to be promoted to Support Store Manager.

WHAT WE OFFER?
🔸 Attractive Income
🔸 Valuable Paid Training Provided
🔸 Good career progression

WHAT CAN YOU LEARN?
As a Management Trainee, you will be undergoing a training of 12 months (6months + 2months + 2months + 2months) to develop you as key person in our company's key business functions. We are proud of our management trainees and have great respect for the work you do. Therefore, we value your training and development program and your personal learning journey throughout the program.

You will be assigned a mentor/coach throughout the training to facilitate learning process.

The below course is designed to allowed selected trainees the best hands-on training experience, this is the perfect opportunity to build a successful management career.

First 6 months (Basic and Work shift development)
• You will be trained to handle full outlet operations in the first 6 months which includes backend kitchen duties, front end customer services, tea making procedure, product quality assurance, manpower planning and cost controlling.

Second 2 months (Training store)
• You will be assigned to other training outlets to apply what you have been learn in the past 6 months; you will guide the new join as a mentor/coach’s anger.

Third 2 months (Leadership development)
• You will learn how to manage a store to understand the fundamentals of business structure and develop your strengths to build your leadership qualities.

Fourth 2 months (QC/Training course)
•You will also have the chance to attend QC and Training course that will equip with essential expertise to perform future assigned positions.

Responsibilities:
•Assist the manager in the daily management of the day-to-day operations of the store
•Attend to customers' request efficiently and effectively
•Maintain cleanliness of the store

Fresh graduates and career switchers with a minimum of one year of F&B experience are welcome to apply.

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted

Benefits:
• Attractive remuneration
• Transport Allowance
• Meal Allowance
• Staff drink
• Annual Leave
• Health and Dental Benefits
• Training and Career Progression
• Training provided
• Sign-on Bonus
#Terms and Conditions apply

title: Analyst/Associate - AI Developer/Engineer
raw_description:
We are seeking an AI Developer/Engineer to support the design, development, and deployment of AI-driven solutions for key business functions including Investment, Relationship Management, Risk, Operations, and Compliance. Working under the guidance of senior team members, you will help translate business requirements into functional AI applications. This is an excellent opportunity for someone early in their career to gain hands-on experience with modern AI technologies, including Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and AI agents.

This role offers exposure to a variety of AI projects, from intelligent automation and document processing to investment analytics and risk monitoring.

Duties & Responsibilities

AI Solution Development

  • Assist in building AI-powered applications using LLMs and RAG pipelines under the guidance of senior team members.
  • Support the development and optimization of retrieval systems, including vector databases, embedding strategies, and semantic search capabilities.
  • Implement and refine prompt engineering techniques to improve model accuracy, context understanding, and response quality.
  • Help develop AI agents—tool-using LLM workflows that integrate with internal systems, knowledge bases, and external APIs to automate tasks and provide intelligent recommendations.

Full-Stack Development

  • Contribute to building web applications with intuitive user interfaces that deliver AI capabilities to business users.
  • Assist in developing APIs and microservices to support AI features and integrate with existing systems.
  • Ensure applications are responsive, secure, and follow development best practices.

Data Management & Integration

  • Support the development of data pipelines for ingesting, processing, and indexing content from internal and external sources.
  • Work with various teams to understand data requirements and ensure secure handling of sensitive information.
  • Assist in integrating third-party APIs, market data feeds, and internal databases to enhance AI application capabilities.

Collaboration & Learning

  • Partner with stakeholders in Investment, Relationship Management, Risk, Operations, and Compliance to understand requirements and deliver solutions.
  • Contribute to documentation and training materials to support adoption of AI-powered features.
  • Stay current with emerging AI technologies, frameworks, and best practices; share learnings with the team.

Key Qualifications

Technical Skills

  • Programming Languages: Strong proficiency in Python; familiarity with JavaScript/TypeScript is a plus.
  • AI/ML Technologies: Hands-on experience or strong academic projects involving LLMs (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic, or open-source models), RAG architectures, vector databases, and frameworks such as LangChain or similar.
  • Full-Stack Development: Exposure to front-end frameworks (e.g., React, Vue.js, or similar) and back-end development (e.g., FastAPI, Flask, or similar).
  • Database Systems: Basic knowledge of relational databases (e.g., PostgreSQL) and/or NoSQL solutions.

Business Understanding

  • Interest in financial services, investment management, or fintech; willingness to learn domain-specific concepts.
  • Ability to understand business requirements and contribute to technical solutions with guidance from senior team members.

Soft Skills

  • Collaboration & Communication: Ability to work effectively with both technical and non-technical colleagues.
  • Problem-Solving: Willingness to tackle ambiguous problems and learn through experimentation.
  • Adaptability: Eager to learn new technologies, AI approaches, and evolving project needs.
  • Proactive Mindset: Self-driven with the ability to take initiative while knowing when to seek guidance.

Education & Experience

  • Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Software Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
  • 0–4 years of professional experience in software development, AI/ML applications, or related projects.

title: Assistant / Care Coordinator(237) - National University Polyclinics
raw_description:
As part of the multidisciplinary team, provide holistic and incredible care, empower patients and caregivers to take charge of their own health through technology, raise awareness and accessibility of available resources that can be tapped on, nudging them towards action.

Strategic outcomes and goals include:

  • To build relationships with internal (care team) and external stakeholders (patients and caregivers).
  • To contribute to achieving clinical outcomes for preventive health screenings and reduce readmission and escalations to tertiary care, and, to gather social determinants of health pertinent to influencing social and health outcomes in positive ways
  • Leverage on technology to empower patients to improve health literacy and accessibility to resources
  • Responsible for assisting in coordinating and providing patient care activities. This includes the use of IT systems to track, perform and document established clinical indicators and care given to patient.
  • You will perform basic parameter measurements, close preventive screening and vaccination gaps in relation to national programmes/initiatives.
  • You will also provide basic health education to improve patients’ knowledge on lifestyle management, social and physical activities through social prescribing, the use of health monitoring devices (e.g. home blood pressure, glucose and weight monitoring, as well as advise patients on vaccination requirements.)

Requirement

  • Diploma preferred.
  • Qualification in health promotion will have an advantage.
  • Preferably with some working experience in healthcare
  • Good verbal and written communication skills
  • Pleasant disposition and personality
  • Possess good interpersonal skills, a positive attitude towards work and is a team player.
  • Good communication and coordination skills
  • Self-motivated and has interest in patient care.
  • Able to communicate in English and a local language/dialect.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office including Excel, Words and Power Point
  • Savvy in navigating IT programs

title: Associate Client Payment Specialist
raw_description:
Some of the things you’ll be doing:

  • Input and process of approved Client Payments – Daily/weekly payments and ad-hoc urgent payments.

  • Ensure all deliverable deadlines are completed in a timely manner.

  • Maintain a good relationship with clients, suppliers, arrangers, colleagues and banks.

  • New client on-boarding - ensure that when an agreed payments process is in place for new and existing clients, that it is always followed and adhered to.

  • Managing and monitoring cash positions of client of bank accounts across multiple jurisdictions and on multiple platforms.

  • Management and prioritisation of teamwork flow and deliverables

  • Assisting in the provision of client due diligence and anti-money laundering requirements both when onboarding new clients/transactions and adhoc.

  • Liaison with onshore team and banks to ensure accurate and timely settlement of all payments.

  • Actively contributing to process improvements within the team & to a positive office environment.

What technical skills, experience, and qualifications do you need?

Required level and content of education:

  • University degree in accounting, finance, economics or related disciplines

Business experience required:

  • Minimum 3 – 5 years' working experience in Banking/Financial services industry 

  • General banking skills are essential, as is the ability to recognise key issues in relation to our clients’ activities

  • The successful candidate should have strong communications and organisational skills, along with an ability to think on their feet and to work in a resourceful manner. 

  • Capable of working on their own initiative but also work well in a team & be comfortable delegating to and managing workflow of colleagues as required.

  • Ability to work under pressure and meet a range of deadlines

  • Excellent time management and client servicing skills

  • An enthusiastic, helpful nature and a flexible attitude will contribute to the success of the candidate.

title: SUPERVISOR
raw_description:
The Site Supervisor oversees the day-to-day operations on construction sites, ensuring that the work is completed according to project specifications, on time, within budget, and in compliance with safety regulations. They manage construction teams, subcontractors, and suppliers while coordinating tasks and addressing issues as they arise. The Site Supervisor also ensures quality control and adheres to company policies and industry standards.

Site Management: Supervise all on-site activities, ensuring the construction process runs smoothly from start to finish.

Team Coordination: Manage, direct, and motivate construction workers, subcontractors, and other personnel to meet deadlines and work efficiently.

Safety Oversight: Ensure that all construction activities follow health and safety regulations and that the site is a safe working environment.

Quality Control: Monitor the quality of work, conduct inspections, and ensure compliance with project specifications and local building codes.

Resource Management: Oversee the delivery, storage, and usage of materials, tools, and equipment on-site, ensuring optimal usage.

Scheduling: Help develop and maintain construction schedules, ensuring projects stay on track and within deadlines.

Problem Solving: Address and resolve issues on-site, including delays, material shortages, or unforeseen challenges.

Communication: Serve as the primary point of contact for project managers, architects, engineers, subcontractors, and clients, ensuring effective communication and reporting.

Documentation: Maintain daily reports on project progress, work completed, and any issues encountered. Document any incidents or safety violations.

Compliance: Ensure all work is performed in compliance with legal and regulatory standards.

Skills and Abilities:

Strong leadership and supervisory skills to manage teams effectively.

Excellent knowledge of construction processes, materials, and safety standards.

Ability to read and interpret blueprints, plans, and technical drawings.

Strong problem-solving and decision-making capabilities.

Good organizational skills and attention to detail.

Proficiency with construction management software (e.g., Procore, Buildertrend) is often preferred.

Good communication skills to interact with various stakeholders.

Job Requirements

Education and Qualifications:

High school diploma or equivalent (required).

A degree or diploma in construction management, civil engineering, or a related field is preferred.

Certification in construction safety (e.g., OSHA) is often required.

title: Marketing executive
raw_description:
Position Type: Full-time, Entry-level

What You'll Do

  • Content Creation & Social Media Management: Plan, produce, and schedule engaging multimedia content for social platforms (Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Facebook, etc.). Capture and edit photos/videos from robot demos, visitor experiences, and behind-the-scenes moments.
  • Campaign Execution: Assist in developing and launching marketing campaigns.
  • Digital Marketing Support: Help manage email marketing initiatives, basic graphic design (e.g., banners, flyers), and performance tracking across digital channels.
  • Audience Engagement: Monitor and interact with our online community, respond to comments/messages, and help grow our digital following.
  • Event & Promotion Support: Collaborate on live and virtual event promotion, including material preparation, onsite content capture, and post-event follow-up.

  • Recent graduate (Diploma/Degree in Marketing, Communications, Media, Business, or related fields).
  • A genuine interest in robotics, technology, and immersive visitor experiences.

  • Basic experience or strong willingness to learn social media management, content creation, and simple design tools.
  • Familiarity with Microsoft Office / Google Workspace.
  • Organized, proactive, and able to manage multiple projects in a fast-paced setting.

Why Join Us?

  • Portfolio-Building Role: Create tangible, shareable content and campaigns from day one.
  • Growth in Tech Marketing: Develop specialized skills in promoting cutting-edge technology within a growing robotics company.
  • Collaborative & Innovative Environment: Join a team that values creativity, experimentation, and cross-functional teamwork.

title: Full-Time Counsellor (Singapore)
raw_description:
The Role

We are seeking a qualified and experienced Counsellor to join our growing team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in delivering evidence-based treatments, particularly Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), and experience in administering psychological assessments as well as strong report writing skills. 

What You'll Do

  • Develop and implement individualised treatment plans using evidence-based interventions, with a primary focus on CBT.
  • Develop specialised clinical care pathways in line with the evidence-base and best practice.
  • Provide individual, couples, group therapy sessions for clients, both in-person and virtually.
  • Participate in team meetings and contribute to ongoing service development and improvement initiatives.
  • Collaborate with our interdisciplinary team to develop and implement client-centered treatment plans.
  • Work closely with our 24/7 helpline responder team to manage risk, ensure the safety of clients in crisis situations and provide crisis interventions
  • Develop and implement SOPs for risk management and clinical procedures, and train providers on these processes.
  • Maintain accurate and up-to-date client records in accordance with professional and legal standards.
  • Continuously update professional knowledge and skills through participation in continuing education and professional development activities.
  • Ability to commit to clinic operating hours of Monday to Friday 10-9pm and Saturday 10-2pm on a roster basis. There will be 2 evening working days each week (1-9pm) and 2 working Saturdays each month. 

Requirements

  • A Master's Degree in Counselling 
  • At least 3 years of post-graduate clinical or counselling experience, preferably in a mental health setting.
  • Expertise in individual and group facilitation
  • Proficient in planning and executing online seminars with the use of various web platforms and adept at creating engaging content.
  • Proficient in effectively navigating and managing crisis situations.
  • Strong knowledge and experience in delivering evidence-based treatments with a focus on CBT as a core treatment modality.
  • Current registration or eligibility for registration as a Counsellor in Singapore (Singapore Association for Counselling or SAC).
  • Must be able to conduct in-person sessions at Intellect's office location or our partnered client's location.
  • Good to have: Experience in providing clinical supervision to other mental health professionals.

To help us process applications more quickly, please submit yours in this link: https://apply.workable.com/intellecthq/j/67E6C76F33/apply/

title: Investment Banking Intern
raw_description:
About the job

Company Description

Founded in 2000, Huntington Advisory is an independent advisory firm specialising in M&A, capital raising, and strategic value creation across the financial services sector, with particular depth in insurance and reinsurance. The firm advises corporates, founders, and financial sponsors on complex, cross-border transactions, leveraging deep sector expertise, proprietary insights, and disciplined execution.

Additional information is available at huntingtonadvisory.com.

Role Description

The Strategic Advisory Intern will work closely with senior team members across live transactions and strategic assignments. The role offers hands-on exposure to M&A advisory, financial analysis, and FIG-sector strategy within a lean, high-performance environment. High-performing interns who are in their final years may be considered for longer-term or conversion opportunities.

Key Responsibilities

  • Conduct industry, market, and company research to support origination, strategic analysis, and transaction execution.
  • Support the preparation of client materials, including pitch decks, teasers, company profiles, and internal briefing documents.
  • Assist with financial analysis and valuation work, including DCFs, trading comparables, precedent transactions, and scenario analysis.
  • Support due diligence by reviewing financial statements, operating data, and transaction materials, and summarising key findings.
  • Provide general analytical and execution support across ongoing strategic and M&A assignments.

Qualifications

  • Education: Undergraduate or postgraduate students in Finance, Economics, Engineering, Mathematics, Actuarial Science, Physics, or related analytical disciplines. Students from all academic years are welcome to apply.
  • Analytical Skills: Strong quantitative ability, sound judgement, and high attention to detail.
  • Technical Skills: Proficiency in Excel and PowerPoint; familiarity with valuation and accounting concepts is an advantage.
  • Sector Interest: Strong interest in M&A, corporate finance, and financial services (insurance / reinsurance exposure is a plus but not required).
  • Professional Attributes: Highly motivated, intellectually curious, reliable, and comfortable working in a fast-paced, lean team environment.
  • Experience: Prior internship experience in finance, consulting, or strategy is helpful but not required.


Availability & Commitment

  • Applicants should clearly state their availability (start date, duration, and weekly commitment) in their CV.
  • Minimum commitment: 6 months preferred (up to 12 months strongly encouraged).
  • Part-time arrangements are permitted, subject to availability and team requirements.

title: Marketing Data & Operations Intern (6 Months)
raw_description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

  • At Sekuro, we are the trusted cybersecurity partner for a diverse range of organisations, from multinational corporations to small and medium-sized enterprises. Our comprehensive suite of services supports clients throughout their entire cybersecurity lifecycle, anchored by our five core business pillars: Governance, Risk and Compliance (GRC), Offensive Security (RED), Technologies Platform & Engineering (TPE), Managed Security Services (MSS), and Team Augmentation (TAM).

Job Summary

We are seeking a proactive, detail-oriented Intern to optimize our marketing engine by managing inbound leads, maintaining database integrity, and supporting daily marketing operations. This role offers a valuable opportunity to develop skills in Marketing Analytics, RevOps, or Business Intelligence.

Responsibilities

  • Review, categorize, and clean incoming and historical marketing leads to ensure accurate routing to appropriate sales channels
  • Conduct regular audits of CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce) to remove duplicates, correct formatting, and update missing contact information
  • Develop dashboards or spreadsheets that track lead conversion rates and campaign performance to inform marketing strategies
  • Perform ad-hoc market research on target industries and competitors to enhance lead data quality and relevance
  • Provide administrative support including preparing marketing documentation, taking meeting notes, and assisting with scheduling
  • Collaborate with supervisors to support special projects or initiatives that contribute to Sekuro’s marketing objectives and business growth

Required competencies and certifications

  • Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets, including data cleaning, complex formulas, and data modeling
  • Familiarity with CRM architectures such as Salesforce, HubSpot, or Dynamics 365, and understanding of the lead-to-revenue lifecycle
  • Exceptional organizational skills to manage high-volume administrative tasks with precision and accuracy
  • Strong analytical skills to identify data trends and deliver actionable insights to the marketing team
  • Effective written and verbal communication skills with the ability to handle sensitive internal data discreetly

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Business Analytics, Marketing Research, Statistics, or a related quantitative field

Other Information

  • Location: Singapore

title: Research Assistant
raw_description:
Company Introduction:‌

OREGENX is an innovative biotechnology company focused on organoid applications. We are dedicated to revolutionizing organoid technology and pioneering a new paradigm of precision medicine driven by patient-specific organoid models. By providing high-fidelity disease model sand drug-testing platforms, we enhance translational efficiency for pharmaceutical R&D and offer personalized therapeutic decision-making tools for clinical institutions. Our company has established a comprehensive organoid biobank covering multiple organ systems and diseases, continuously exploring the full value chain from drug screening to organ regeneration therapies. (http://oregenx.com/en)

Job Description:‌

We are seeking a Research Assistant to perform daily laboratory tasks related to human stem cell culture, direct differentiation and organoid application. This position is ideal for junior researchers embracing the translational application of regenerative medicine. Candidates areexpected to be highly motivated, possess strong communication and organizationskills. The successful applicant will have the opportunity to learn cutting-edgeorganoid and genome editing technologies and develop a promising career path.


Key Responsibilities:‌

1. Strictly adhere to laboratory Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and safety regulations to ensure a safe working environment for all laboratory users.

2. General administrative and laboratory duties, such as procurement, equipment and cleanroom maintenance.

3. Assist in maintaining the stem cell culture platform.

4. Perform molecular, cellular, biochemical and immunological analyses.

5. Contribute to the construction and management of organoid biobanks.

6. Faithfully document and present R&D procedures and data as required.

Qualifications:‌

1. A bachelor’s degree in biology, regenerative medicine, bioengineering, or a related field.

2. Highly responsible, self-motivated, resilient, and entrepreneurial, with a willingness to growalongside the company.

3. Hands-on experience in molecular and cell biology, including molecular cloning and cell culture, is preferred.

4. Experience in human stem cell culture is advantageous.

Candidates interested in this position are invited to send their resumes to HR@OREGENX.COM.

We regret that only short-listed candidates will be notified.

title: Medical Laboratory Technologist
raw_description:
Job Description:

  • Duties include working in pre-analytical, analytical, maintenance and troubleshooting of laboratory instrumentation, technical validation and inventory management.
  • Operates and maintains sophisticated instruments and equipment used in the laboratory.
  • Able to properly set up, calibrate, maintain, operate and shut down the analytical instruments.
  • Perform all procedures in accordance with Laboratory Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs).
  • Processes, analyses, verifies and release results within the expected turn around time.
  • Ensure compliance with all requirements of the Laboratory Safety Manual.
  • Ensure that “critical value” of lab results are reported timely to the relevant appropriate personnel as well as resolve queries from customers as needed.
  • Maintains competence in Laboratory Information System (LIS).
  • Maintains a safe and clean working environment by adhering to safety procedures and regulations.
  • Participates in Quality Improvement Programs and Proficiency Programs essential to ensure that laboratory testing is accurate, timely and meets customer needs.
  • Escalates lab issues to supervisors or lab management in a timely manner
  • Any other duties as assigned by Laboratory Manager.

Job Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree or Diploma in Biological Sciences/Biomedical Sciences/Medical Technology.
  • Preferably with some relevant experience.
  • A team player as well as working independently
  • Good working attitude and ability to work under pressure
  • Ability to do detailed work and maintain a high level of accuracy
  • Able to take up challenges
  • Good general health and no colour blindness
  • Strong verbal and written communication and organizational skills
  • Ability to adequately maintain accurate records and follow Standard Operating Procedures.

Work Week: 3 weeks 5 days, 1 week 6 days

  • Monday to Friday: 8.30 am to 5.00 pm OR 1.30 pm to 10.30 PM
  • Saturday: 10.00 am to 7.00 pm (3 Saturday Off, 1 Saturday Full)

Actual working hours might change due to operation requirements.

We collect and use your personal data (e.g., name, contact info, resume) to process your job application.

Your data is shared with relevant personnel and protected with security measures.

By applying, applicants consent to the stated collection, use, and disclosure of their personal information.

title: FP&A Analyst
raw_description:
Overview:
This role manages finances across APAC, supports month‑end closing, forecasting, budgeting, and provides financial insights to leadership, P&L reporting and ad‑hoc analysis.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Lead monthly closing, budgeting and quarterly forecasts with clear variance explanations.

  • Bachelor’s degree in Finance or Accounting.
  • 2-3 years of FP&A or related finance experience.
  • Strong communication and cross‑functional collaboration skills.
  • Skilled in BI dashboard creation (Power BI/Tableau).

title: Trainee Teacher (Place-and-Train Programme)
raw_description:
About the Programme:

Join our Place-and-Train (P&T) programme and kickstart your career in early childhood education. This structured programme combines on-the-job training with sponsored professional qualifications, preparing you to become a fully qualified childcare teacher while gaining hands-on experience in a preschool environment.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Support teachers in daily classroom activities and routines.

  • Assist in caring for children, including supervising play, routines, and basic hygiene.

  • Observe and learn from experienced teachers to develop foundational teaching and classroom management skills.

  • Participate in training workshops, assessments, and sponsored diploma/qualification courses.

  • Assist in maintaining classroom tidiness, cleaning toys and Montessori teaching materials.

  • Contribute to school events, activities, and other initiatives.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or degree in any discipline (fresh graduates, career switchers, and those without preschool experience are welcome).

  • Passion for working with young children and strong communication skills.

  • Willingness to learn and commit to the Place-and-Train programme.

  • Positive attitude, teamwork spirit, and eagerness to grow in the early childhood sector.

What We Offer:

  • Sponsored early childhood teaching diploma/qualification while you work.

  • Hands-on mentoring and professional development support.

  • Competitive salary during the training period.

  • Clear progression to a fully qualified childcare teacher role upon successful completion.

How to Apply:
Submit your resume via MyCareersFuture

title: Operations Executive
raw_description:
Reporting into the Assistant Operations Manager, you will be responsible for supporting sales order processing and fulfilment operations, coordinating deliveries, inventory and sales orders analysis/reporting.

The role plays a key part in ensuring order accuracy, inventory availability, and on-time delivery to support business growth and customer satisfaction.

Specifically, you will

  • Liaise with Sales to understand demand requirements and provide purchase order analysis for confirmation of quantities.
  • Update orders in ERP system and place orders with the suppliers.
  • Liaise and follow up with suppliers on shipping arrangement as well as co-ordinate with freight forwarder and manage custom clearance.
  • Manage inventory accuracy by ensuring physical stock and system records are aligned, and investigate discrepancies where required.
  • Prepare and submit monthly reports to Management and Division Managers.
  • Coordinate the deployment and utilization of the Dispatch for delivery, support process improvement to enhance efficiency and undertake cost-benefit analysis.
  • Liaise and follow up with shipping service providers.

Key Requirements

  • Minimum diploma with 1-2 years of relevant work experience in logistics.
  • Fresh graduates are welcome to apply.
  • You should be proficient in Microsoft Dynamics.
  • Possess good interpersonal and communication skills and demonstrate ownership, initiative, and attention to detail in a fast-moving operations environment.
  • Having a growth mindset, customer focused and able to work independently as well as collaboratively in a team are desired attributes.

title: Human Resource Executive
raw_description:
Reports to: Directors

Core purpose of the role: This position will play a pivotal role in the operations team for all HR related matters. The individual will be responsible for all aspects of HR from recruitment, onboarding/ off boarding processes, claims, training and development, as well as staff engagement and welfare of the employees.

Job scopes:

Recruitment and On-boarding

  • Determine and use the appropriate sourcing channel (including Jobs Bank, LinkedIn, job portals, recruitment agencies and internal applications)
  • Coordinate the recruitment process, including but not limited to understanding job specifications, posting advertisements, pre-screening of candidate’s applications according to specifications, submitting qualified applications to the hiring managers and tracking application progress to position close
  • Conduct interviews
  • Arrange background check of new hires
  • Manage end-to-end on-boarding activities including but not limited to accounts creation, IT related email and access, induction packs
  • Arrange new hire induction

HR Operations

  • Provide prompt update and accurate maintenance of employee database and personnel files
  • Support in providing inputs to update HR reports, budget report, internal HR working templates, external statutory/labour market survey and headcount related reporting
  • Monitor employees' work pass / MOM employment pass compliance
  • Monitor probationary period, etc 
  • Review and update Employee Handbooks and Business Conduct Guidelines
  • Maintain organisation charts and prepare monthly HR reports
  • Support in the update of HR policies, processes and procedures

Performance Management

  • Support the full suite of annual performance review cycle (communications to staff, creation of online forms and provide updates on completion rates and analytics)
  • Work closely with business leaders to ensure the performance management exercises are properly executed and completed on time

Pay Review

  • Support the annual pay review process
  • Creation of excel spreadsheets for management input and analytics to update data on performance excel spreadsheets
  • Participate in C&B surveys and benchmark with various key companies in similar industry

Employee Relations

  • Support to business leaders in all employee relations matters
  • Provide HR policies guidance and interpretation to employees
  • Handle employee grievances, disciplinary issues and counsel staff

Offboarding

  • Coordinate exit process: payroll, employee records, exit interviews

Payroll & Benefits Administration

  • Manage and execute regular benefits administrations
  • Ensure timely and accurate execution of CPF, government-claim submissions (Maternity, Paternity, Childcare and NS claims), income tax (IR8A and IR21) matters
  • Maintain accuracy and update movements in company insurance policy

Employee Engagement

  • Plan and execute internal employee engagement activities such as dialogues, and corporate staff engagement events.

Learning & Development

  • Conduct training needs analysis for business units and employees.
  • Source for external vendors, coordinate course registration and training grant applications
  • Evaluate and monitor training programs and budgets

Ad Hoc Projects

  • Drive and implement process improvements to increase HR efficiency and effectiveness.
  • Participate in ad-hoc assignments and projects as assigned.

Qualifications & Experience:

  • University Degree in Human Resources or related degree
  • Strong knowledge of HR generalist functions and at least 3 years of relevant experience

Knowledge / Skills

  • Confidentiality and discretion.
  • Excellent attention to detail and organisational skills.
  • Effective communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Comfortable in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.
  • Proactive and highly organized with excellent time management skills & adherence to deadlines.
  • A problem solver with a “can do” attitude who is not afraid to think outside the box.   
  • A collaborative team player, who is sociable
  • Ability to work independently and autonomously. 
  • Advanced knowledge of MS Office: Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Outlook

title: Banking Sales Associate
raw_description:
Responsibilities:


1. Customer Engagement:

- Build and maintain strong relationships with customers.

- Provide excellent customer service and address inquiries regarding financial products and services.

- Actively engage in cross-selling and upselling financial products to meet sales targets.


2. Product Knowledge:

- Stay updated on the bank's products and services.

- Effectively communicate product features and benefits to customers.

- Assist customers in selecting the right banking products to meet their financial needs.


3. Sales Targets:

- Achieve and exceed monthly sales targets.

- Identify opportunities for revenue generation and actively pursue them.

- Collaborate with team members to enhance overall sales performance.


4. Documentation and Processing:

- Assist customers in completing necessary documentation for various financial transactions.

- Ensure accuracy and compliance with financial regulations in all customer interactions.

- Process the forwarding of account openings, loan applications, and other financial transactions efficiently.


5. Compliance:

- Stay informed about and adhere to all relevant banking/ financial regulations and compliance standards.

- Ensure that all customer interactions and transactions comply with internal policies and external regulations.


6. Problem Resolution:

- Address and resolve customer issues and complaints in a timely and effective manner.

- Collaborate with other departments to resolve complex customer inquiries.


7. Team Collaboration:

- Work closely with team members to achieve overall goals.

- Participate in team meetings and contribute to a positive team environment.


8. Market Research:

- Stay informed about industry trends, market conditions, and competitor offerings.

- Provide feedback to management regarding customer preferences and market demands.


9. Training and Development:

- Participate in ongoing training programs to enhance product knowledge and sales skills.

- Share insights and best practices with team members to improve overall performance.



Qualifications:

- Local diploma or A Levels; bachelor's degree in business or related field is a plus.

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills.

- Knowledge of banking products and services.

- Ability to work in a target-driven environment.

- Attention to detail and strong organizational skills.

title: IT End-User / Desktop Support Trainee (WSP)
raw_description:
Summary

The IT End-User / Desktop Support Specialist provides technical assistance, troubleshooting, and support to employees for hardware, software, network, and system issues. This role ensures smooth day-to-day operations of end-user devices and contributes to maintaining a secure, efficient, and user-friendly IT environment.

Key Responsibilities

1)End-User Support & Troubleshooting

•Provide technical support for desktops, laptops, mobile devices, and peripherals.

•Diagnose and resolve hardware, software, and connectivity issues in person (walk-in counter) and remotely (MS Teams).

•Assist with user onboarding and offboarding (account and access testing, equipment provisioning and setup).

•Support MS Windows, macOS, Microsoft 365, and common business applications.

2)Device & System Administration

•Install, configure, and maintain desktops, laptops, mobile devices (iPhone and iPad).

•Perform OS updates, software installations, patches, and system upgrades.

•Maintain accurate inventory of IT assets and accessories.

3) Incident & Request Management

•Attend, track, and close tickets through the ITSM tool (ServiceNow).

•Escalate unresolved issues to higher-level support teams or vendors when necessary.

•Follow SLAs to ensure timely and effective delivery of support.

4)Security & Compliance

•Enforce endpoint security standards (antivirus, encryption, MFA, data protection).

•Support compliance with company policies, audits, and cybersecurity best practices.

5)IT Projects & Continuous Improvement

•Participate in IT infrastructure upgrades, rollouts, and improvement initiatives.

•Document processes, troubleshooting procedures, FAQs, and knowledge base articles.

•Provide user training and guidance on tools, systems, and best practices.

Required Qualifications

•Certificate, diploma or degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or related fields.

•1–3 years of experience in desktop support or technical support roles.

•Strong knowledge of Windows 10/11, macOS, Microsoft 365, and Active Directory.

•Hands-on experience with laptops, desktops, and mobile device management (MDM).

•Familiarity with basic networking (TCP/IP, DNS, Wi-Fi troubleshooting).

Preferred Qualifications

•Certifications such as CompTIA A+, CompTIA Network+, ITIL Foundation, Microsoft Certified: Modern Desktop Administrator Associate, etc.

•Experience with ITSM tools (ServiceNow, JIRA, Freshsevice, etc.).

•Experience in supporting hybrid/remote work environments.

Key Competencies

•Strong communication and customer service skills.

•Analytical mindset with solid problem-solving abilities.

•Ability to multitask and manage priorities under pressure.

•Collaborative team player with a proactive attitude

title: Accounting Intern
raw_description:
An Accounting Intern supports the finance department with daily tasks, including data entry, account reconciliation, accounts payable/receivable, and financial reporting

Key Responsibilities

  • Data Entry & Bookkeeping: Perform data entry, maintain accurate financial records, and update accounting files.
  • Financial Reporting: Assist in preparing, analyzing, and reviewing financial reports and statements.
  • Accounts Payable/Receivable: Process invoices, follow up on payments, and manage expense reports.
  • Reconciliation & Auditing: Assist with bank reconciliations, internal audits, and compliance checks.
  • Administrative Support: Maintain filing systems, research discrepancies, and assist with month-end/year-end closing processes. 

Required Qualifications & Skills

  • Education: Currently pursuing or recently completed a Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or Economics.
  • Skills: Strong understanding of basic accounting principles and GAAP.
  • Software: Proficiency in Microsoft Office (especially Excel) and familiarity with accounting software like QuickBooks, Xero, or SAP.
  • Attributes: High attention to detail, strong analytical, organizational, and communication skills.
  • Integrity: Ability to handle confidential financial information with discretion
