title: Quantity Surveyor
raw_description:
Company Overview

OAL Builders Pte Ltd (OAL) is a construction firm that specialises in private residential homebuilding.

Job Summary

You will prepare and manage cost estimates, budgets, and project financials to ensure effective cost control and contract administration. Collaborate with consultants, contractors, and clients to support successful project delivery and tender processes.

Responsibilities

  • Prepare detailed cost estimates, budgets, and Bills of Quantities (BQ) to support project planning and financial management
  • Monitor and control project costs by tracking expenditures and comparing against budgets to ensure financial targets are met
  • Evaluate progress claims and variation orders to assess accuracy and compliance with contract terms
  • Assist in tendering processes by preparing documentation and supporting contract administration activities
  • Prepare monthly cost reports and final accounts to provide transparent financial updates to stakeholders
  • Liaise effectively with consultants, contractors, and clients to facilitate communication and resolve cost-related issues

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Diploma or Degree in Quantity Surveying or a related field
  • Basic knowledge of construction contracts and costing principles to support accurate financial assessments
  • Ability to read and interpret construction drawings for cost estimation and project evaluation
  • Proficiency in MS Excel to analyze and manage project data; experience with Quantity Surveying software is advantageous
  • Strong communication and negotiation skills to engage with project stakeholders and support contract discussions
  • Fresh graduates are welcome; prior experience in quantity surveying or construction cost management is advantageous

title: Research Fellow / Engineer (Food Engineering) - AZN5
raw_description:
As a University of Applied Learning, SIT works closely with industry in our research pursuits. Our research staff will have the opportunity to be equipped with applied research skill sets that are relevant to industry demands while working on research projects in SIT. 

The primary purpose of this role is to deliver on a collaborative research project, Proteins for Singapore (P4SG), where you will be part of the research team to establish and understand the structuration of algae/soybean/mung bean proteins for high quality alternative protein foods including through high moisture extrusion.

Key responsibilities will include:

  • Explore innovative methods for food process optimization including the use of AI and machine-learning
  • Develop and execute methods for characterizing and linking the texture and structure of alternative protein foods
  • Design, execute, and interpret experiments independently.
  • Participate in and manage the research project with Principal Investigators (PI), and the research team members to ensure all project deliverables including periodic progress reports are met.
  • Author papers in high-quality journals and contribute to grant writing in areas that are related to the research.
  • Carry out Risk Assessment, and ensure compliance with Work, Safety and Health Regulations.
  • Coordinate procurement and liaison with vendors/suppliers.
  • Work independently, as well as manage a team of junior researchers and students to ensure proper operation and maintenance of equipment.
  • To communicate and liaise with any internal and external stakeholders to ensure project deliverables are met.
  • Any other ad-hoc duties assigned by supervisor.

Ideal qualities of the candidate include:

  • Able to build and maintain strong working relationships with people within and external to the university.
  • Self-directed learner who believes in continuous learning and development
  • Highly proficient in technical writing and presentation 
  • Strong analytical and critical thinking skills
  • Strong initiative and takes ownership of work

The candidate should have relevant competence in the areas of processing technology, physical and structural analysis, material formulation, and mathmatical modeling. The candidate should also have a PhD or other advanced degree in a food or engineering related field. Knowledge of food formulation, sensory analysis, extrusion technology, machine learning, and rheology will be advantageous.

title: Full Stack Developer Intern
raw_description:
About Us

Innovate. Create. Elevate.
﻿At Vertis, we believe innovation starts with people. We design and deliver exceptional digital solutions that elevate our clients' brands and the experiences they create for their customers. Through technology-driven creativity, we enable meaningful business transformation. Our team is made up of capable, confident, and motivated individuals who collaborate, challenge ideas, and grow together.

About the job
﻿We are looking for a motivated Full Stack Intern to support our development team in building and maintaining web applications. You will gain hands-on experience working with backend technologies (Node.js and/or .NET), front-end frameworks, REST APIs, and cloud platforms while learning from experienced developers.

Key Responsibilities

  • Assist in developing and maintaining backend services using Node.js and/or .NET.
  • Support building and updating frontend components using modern frameworks.
  • Help integrate frontend interfaces with backend services through APIs.
  • Assist with debugging, testing, and resolving application issues.
  • Collaborate with developers and team members on assigned tasks.
  • Follow coding standards and development best practices.

Requirement and Qualification

  • Currently pursuing or recently completed a Diploma or Bachelor's degree in a related field.
  • Basic understanding of frontend and backend development concepts.
  • Familiarity with web technologies or programming languages is a plus.
  • Strong willingness to learn and grow as a developer.
  • Good problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
  • Ability to work effectively in a team environment.

Our Hiring Process
﻿After submitting your application, our Talent Acquisition team will review your profile. If your skills and experience align with the role, we'll get in touch to discuss the next steps. Please be cautious of recruitment fraud; only engage with emails from our official team that end with @vertis.digital domain.

title: Business Analyst Intern
raw_description:
About Us

Innovate. Create. Elevate.

At Vertis, we believe innovation starts with people. We design and deliver exceptional digital solutions that elevate our clients' brands and the experiences they create for their customers. Through technology-driven creativity, we enable meaningful business transformation. Our team is made up of capable, confident, and motivated individuals who collaborate, challenge ideas, and grow together.

About the job

The Business Analyst Intern supports the Business Analysis team in gathering, analysing, and documenting business requirements for digital and technology-driven projects. This role provides hands-on exposure to real client projects, Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) practices, and Agile delivery environments. The internship is designed for final-semester students or recent graduates who are keen to build a strong foundation in Business Analysis and grow into a full-time role. High-performing interns may be considered for a permanent position upon successful completion of the internship.

Key Responsibilities

  • Support the gathering and documentation of business and functional requirements
  • Assist senior Business Analysts in preparing requirement documents, user stories, and process flows
  • Participate in stakeholder meetings, requirement workshops, and project discussions
  • Help analyse business processes and identify gaps or improvement opportunities
  • Support the preparation of functional documentation and solution artefacts
  • Assist in developing test plans and test cases, and support User Acceptance Testing (UAT) activities
  • Help track requirement changes and maintain documentation updates
  • Support system testing, defect tracking, and follow-up on issue resolution
  • Assist with system training, knowledge transfer, and post-implementation activities
  • Work with local and offshore teams to support timely and quality project delivery
  • Learn and follow established Business Analysis processes, tools, and best practices

Requirement and Qualification

  • Final-semester students or recent graduates pursuing or holding a diploma or degree in Business Administration, Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field are preferred
  • Strong interest in Business Analysis, digital systems, and technology projects
  • Good analytical thinking, problem-solving skills, and attention to detail
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills
  • Ability to work collaboratively in a team-oriented environment
  • Proactive, self-motivated, and willing to learn
  • Able to take ownership of assigned tasks and follow through

Added Advantage

  • Exposure to tools such as JIRA, Confluence, or similar
  • Basic understanding of system integrations or APIs
  • Familiarity with Agile frameworks such as Scrum or Kanban
  • Experience working on digital or technology-driven projects

Career Growth Opportunity

  • Structured learning and mentorship from experienced Business Analysts
  • Hands-on exposure to real-world enterprise and digital transformation projects
  • Opportunity to convert to a permanent Business Analyst role, subject to performance and business requirements

Our Hiring Process

After submitting your application, our Talent Acquisition team will review your profile. If your skills and experience align with the role, we'll get in touch to discuss the next steps. Please be cautious of recruitment fraud; only engage with emails from our official team that end with @vertis.digital domain.

title: Quality Assurance Engineer Intern
raw_description:
About Us

Innovate. Create. Elevate.   

At Vertis, we believe innovation starts with people. We design and deliver exceptional digital solutions that elevate our clients' brands and the experiences they create for their customers. Through technology-driven creativity, we enable meaningful business transformation. Our team is made up of capable, confident, and motivated individuals who collaborate, challenge ideas, and grow together.

About the job

As a QA Intern, you will support our QA and development teams in ensuring our software meets quality standards. This internship offers hands-on experience in software testing, exposure to automation testing practices, and the opportunity to learn industry-standard QA methodologies in a real-world environment.

Key Responsibilities

  • Assist in running automated tests for web and digital applications.
  • Help identify and report software defects.
  • Support testing of new features and bug fixes.
  • Participate in functional and regression testing activities.
  • Help maintain test cases and basic automation scripts.
  • Work with developers and QA team members to understand application features.
  • Follow QA best practices and testing processes.
  • Assist with test results and basic quality reporting.

Requirements and Qualifications

  • Currently pursuing or recently completed a Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field.
  • Basic understanding of software development and testing concepts.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Good attention to detail and willingness to follow testing procedures.
  • Ability to communicate clearly and work well in a team environment.
  • Eagerness to learn automation testing tools and QA methodologies.
  • Familiarity with web applications and digital platforms is a plus.

Our Hiring Process

After submitting your application, our Talent Acquisition team will review your profile. If your skills and experience align with the role, we'll get in touch to discuss the next steps. title: Landscape Designer
raw_description:
Landscape Designer

About Us

SCDA is an international practice integrating Architecture, Interiors and Landscape to create holistic spatial experiences. With offices in Singapore, Shanghai, Manila and New York City, SCDA has projects in over 80 locations across Asia, Africa, Europe, Oceania, and North America. In parallel, SCDA Lab pioneers social and cultural initiatives, applying research and design to enact measurable change and advance the environmental cause.

The Role

We are seeking an experienced Landscape Designer to join our Singapore Headquarters. This role requires a confident designer who can take ownership of workstreams, travel when required, and engage professionally with consultants, contractors, and project stakeholders. You will play a key role in delivering high-profile international projects, translating strong design ideas into refined, buildable landscape outcomes across diverse global contexts.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design and develop architectural landscape projects from concept design through schematic design, design development, and construction documentation.
  • Represent the practice in coordination meetings with consultants, contractors, and project teams, both locally and overseas.
  • Travel as required to support project coordination, design development, and site-related matters.
  • Produce clear and compelling design material, including 3D models and visualisations (D5 Render, Lumion, 3ds Max), to communicate design intent effectively.
  • Work closely with architects and internal teams to ensure design quality, technical rigour, and alignment with project timelines and specifications.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Architecture, Landscape Architecture, or a related discipline.
  • Minimum 5 years of professional experience, demonstrating strong design capability and the ability to work independently.
  • Proficiency in 3D visualisation and modelling tools (including D5 Render, Lumion, and 3ds Max), with working knowledge of AutoCAD, SketchUp, Adobe Creative Suite, Revit, and Rhino.
  • Proven ability to communicate confidently with consultants and stakeholders, manage coordination processes, and resolve design and technical issues.
  • Strong design judgement, excellent communication skills, good organisational ability, and a high level of professional responsibility.

Why Join SCDA?

At SCDA, you will be part of a design-led practice committed to creating exceptional spaces that positively impact communities and environments worldwide. We offer a dynamic studio environment, exposure to international projects, competitive compensation and benefits, and opportunities for long-term professional growth.

Application Process

Please submit your resume and portfolio, demonstrating strong design thinking and built or technically developed landscape projects, to careers@scdaarchitects.com.

title: Human Resources Assistant
raw_description:
Ebb & Flow Group is a local Food & Beverage company in Singapore seeking a Human Resources Assistant to support our Senior HR Manager, primarily in payroll processing and HR administrative duties. This role is suitable for fresh graduates or candidates with minimal HR experience who are keen to learn payroll and core HR operations in a fast-paced environment.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Assist in monthly payroll processing using QuickHR

  • Update and maintain employee records, attendance, leave, and payroll data

  • Prepare basic payroll and HR reports using Microsoft Excel

  • Support onboarding and offboarding administrative tasks

  • Handle HR documentation, filing, and data entry

  • Respond to routine payroll and HR-related employee queries

  • Provide administrative support to other HR team members when required

  • Perform ad-hoc HR duties as assigned

Requirements:

  • Diploma/Higher Nitec in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related fields

  • Fresh graduates are welcome to apply

  • Basic knowledge or interest in payroll and HR administration

  • Experience with QuickHR or similar HR systems is an advantage (training will be provided)

  • Basic proficiency in Microsoft Excel (e.g. simple formulas, data entry)

  • Good attention to detail and ability to handle confidential information

  • Willingness to learn with a positive and responsible attitude

title: [2026 Intake] Assurance (Financial Services) Associate
raw_description:
At Baker Tilly Singapore, we welcome highly motivated and committed individuals who share our core values to join us. We are committed to our values of leading by example, delivering quality services with integrity, communicating openly, acting ethically, and fostering a community built around civic responsibility and teamwork.


We are looking for an Assurance (Financial Services) Associate, who will be involved in various sizes of financial services audit engagements which include planning, performing, and concluding the engagement. The Assurance Associate will be exposed to a broad range of capital markets entities and investment funds such as private equities, real estate, mutual funds, variable capital companies, etc.


In this role, you will:

• Involvement in a broad range of statutory and regulatory audit assignments for our financial services clients

• Assist in obtaining all necessary audit working papers and documentation including researching and documenting facts and findings

• Identify and communicate accounting and auditing matters to managers and partners

• Identify performance improvement opportunities

• Interact with clients to help ensure that the information flow from the client to the audit team is efficient


We are looking for people with the following:

• Graduates with an Accountancy degree or equivalent professional qualification in Accountancy

• Accountancy undergraduates in the final year of study are welcome to apply

• Good command of the English language

• Strong interpersonal and client relationship skills

title: APAC Sales Business Analyst, Enterprise Accounts
raw_description:
What you will do:

In this role, you will support APAC enterprise account leaders by contributing to the creation of commercial materials and helping to formalize a comprehensive account management roadmap. You will analyze current trends in the related industries to inform strategic planning and collaborate closely with internal stakeholders across departments.

How you will do it:

  • Conduct research and analysis on account profiling, trends to support strategic planning & partnerships
  • Collaborate with enterprise account leaders, and cross functional teams (e.g. sales, engineering, corporate functions) to ensuring alignment with overall business objectives and tracking progress against established metrics.
  • Support in client facing activities such as Quarterly Business Reviews with identified clients
  • Proactively stay updated on accounts and market changes, demonstrating a keen sense of numbers and a strong attention to details

What we look for:

  • Bachelor’s degree or equivalent with 3-5 years working experience in business/sales analytics, sales operations,
  • Strong analytical skills – able to conduct data analysis independently and summarize results to meaningful findings for stakeholder requirements
  • Pursuing a relevant degree in business/engineering/computing, with keen interest in commercial activities
  • Strong analytical skills and the ability to interpret data effectively
  • Ability to work collaboratively within a team environment
  • Creative problem-solving skills and a proactive approach to tasks
  • Ability to integrate and work with cross-functional teams from different background, cultures and geographies
  • Excellent verbal and written, strong business acumen and excellent interpersonal and communication skills

What we offer:

  • Competitive salary
  • Paid vacation/holidays/sick time
  • Comprehensive benefits package
  • On the job/cross training opportunities
  • Encouraging and collaborative team environment
  • Dedication to safety through our Zero Harm policy

raw_description:
Overview
The Language Specialist is responsible for performing language-related tasks. They communicate with project teams to deal with linguistic issues. The Language Specialist works with clients to improve terminology used and client style guides. This is an entry-level position.

Duties and Responsibilities

  • Translating, reviewing, proofreading, linguistic bug fixing, and other language-related tasks.
  • Communicating with the project team on linguistic issues if necessary.
  • Managing and suggesting new terminology for clients’ approval whenever required.
  • Managing clients’ style guides and/or reference material whenever required.

  • Fluent in English with good communication skills.
  • Native Australian English.
  • Basic familiarity with Microsoft Office 365 including Outlook, Excel, and PowerPoint.
  • Experience in localization/enterprise-oriented software will be highly valued.
  • Knowledge of standard CAT and related translation/terminology management tools.
  • Very organized and able to work under pressure.
  • Team player.
  • Quick learner.

title: Educational Therapist (Chinese) – Flexi Scheme
raw_description:
We are looking for individuals with a passion in teaching Chinese but are not able to commit to a full-time job. Candidates must be able to commit to a minimum of 8 teaching hours per week, and respond at short notice to cover classes at the different DAS learning centres. They must be able to commit to this arrangement for a minimum of two years. All candidates must be registered with the Ministry of Education (MOE) before they can start teaching at the DAS.


Over the years, we have received many requests from parents to provide support in the Chinese Language as well. While some research and remediation programmes have been ongoing in China, Hong Kong and Taiwan, Singapore's unique multilingual environment and learning of Chinese as a second language require differentiation as the challenges that children with dyslexia face in Singapore are different.

The DAS Chinese Team has piloted research in this area in 2009 and kickstarted the Chinese programme for children with dyslexia in Singapore in 2013. The programme, under the Specialised Educational Services (SES) division currently has an enrolment of more than 300 students and has supported more than 500 students over the years.


The duties and responsibilities of a DAS Educational Therapist (Chinese) includes:


  • Providing intervention in the Chinese language in a small group setting
  • Participating in research to evaluate the effectiveness of the programme
  • Undergoing continued training to enhance teaching practices and receive other relevant training as required
  • Responding to relief teaching needs where necessary.


Requirements

  • Degree from a recognised university, in any discipline.
  • Experience in teaching the Chinese subject in MOE schools and/or other relevant qualifications will be an advantage.
  • Familiarity with the MOE Chinese Curriculum is preferred.
  • Proficient in both English and Chinese languages.
  • Ability to work flexible hours including weekday evenings and weekends.
  • Willing to be part of a team that carries out research, develops and delivers the Chinese programme for the DAS.

Minimum Service Period
In view of the full sponsorship by the DAS for the training course fees, there is a minimum service period (MSP) that the Educational Therapists on the flexi scheme (Flexi EdTs) have to serve. The length of the MSP is 640 teaching hours which normally takes two (2) years to attain. The MSP will start from the date of the first teaching class.

Compensation to the DAS is payable should the Flexi Chinese EdT not fulfil the MSP obligations.

Salary and Benefits
Successful candidates will be paid S$50.00 per hour depending on relevant qualifications and teaching experience. The rate applies to teaching hours only and includes training, lesson preparation, post-class documentation, engagement with parents and quality assurance activities, which are not remunerated separately.

Flexi Chinese EdTs who teach on weeknights and Sundays will receive an allowance per teaching hour. Flexi EdTs are also entitled to annual incentives upon meeting the prevailing criteria as announced by Management.

Other benefits include medical coverage for outpatient treatment by general practitioners (GP) and specialists and hospitalization, pro-rated leave entitlement for sick leave, maternity and childcare leave (subject to meeting prevailing eligibility criteria).

Staff are further entitled to dental and health screening benefits on a per-financial-year basis. The organisation also recognises and values long-serving employees through a Long Service Award programme.

For more information, please visit our Careers page at https://das.org.sg/career

All interested applicants are to submit the following as part of their application.

  • DAS Employment Application Form, duly completed (form can be downloaded from the Careers page of our website - https://das.org.sg/careers-at-das/positions-available/)
  • Resume
  • Copies of educational certificates

Email the above submissions to job@das.org.sg by 23 February 2026.
Only completed applications (with the above 3 items) will be considered.

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
All shortlisted candidates are required to attend a Preview Session (date to be advised)

Successful candidates must be able to join us for an initial training commencing on 29 April 2026.

title: Software Quality & Manual Testing (UAT / SIT) [Bank Sector - Wealth Management Retail Banking]
raw_description:
Recruiter Comments:

- Poly grads are welcomed, can be fresh graduates, good working attitude, logical and analytical thinking

- Writing of test cases (can be trained)

- Good to have Jira, SQL not required


Job Description

Your role will require close collaboration across multiple areas within the organization including but not limited to:

1. Project Management Office (PMO)

2. Information Technology (IT)

3. Product Development & Strategy (PD&S)

4. Business Units / Divisions (BU/Ds)

5. Operations (Ops)

6. Risk Management

8. Other relevant units as needed

You will need to develop expertise in understanding the business processes and functions supported by the new system as well as conduct detailed reviews of user requirements and specifications. You will also need to develop and execute test plans, procedures and scenarios to ensure that the system meets all requirements and works seamlessly with other systems.


Responsibilities:

• Define, develop, document, execute and report on test approaches and plans.

• Collaborate closely with project teams as well as other relevant stakeholders such as end users, subject matter experts, technical teams etc.

• Develop and maintain comprehensive test plans for each release, which cover functional and non-functional requirements.

• Design and implement automated and manual test scripts for both short-term and long-term needs.

• Conduct unit, integration and performance tests using various tools and frameworks.

• Provide regular status updates on testing progress and issues.

• Identify and track software defects and work with developers to resolve them.

• Ensure compliance with quality standards and best practices throughout the testing process.

• Support user acceptance testing (UAT) activities.

• Execute ad hoc queries and perform exploratory testing as needed.

Qualifications:

• Polytechnic or Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Finance, Business Administration or related field.

• Experience in IT testing methodologies, tools and techniques is preferred.

• Experience in designing and implementing test automation solutions is preferred

• Familiarity with Agile development methodologies.

• Good communication skills and ability to interact effectively with cross-functional teams.

• Ability to analyze complex problems and propose innovative solutions.

• Excellent attention to detail and strong organizational skills.


Banking Domain/Application Knowledge:

- Banking Knowledge: Wealth Management; Single Portfolio View; Retail Banking Mass Market; Premier Banking; Private Banking; Priority Banking

- Systems: AS400

- Wealth Product Software: Temenos Wealthsuite product Version R23/24 (TAP Core; TAP components like Wealth suite channels or WUI, WTX/ITX, Actuate, Odata)

title: Product Design Intern
raw_description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented Product Design Intern to support our product research and design. This role will allow you to be involved in product research, design coordination, working closely with the design and product teams.

If you enjoy discovering new products, understanding design trends, and learning how ideas turn into real products, this internship will give you hands-on exposure to the full procurement and product lifecycle.

Key Responsibilities

  • Collaborate with the team to brainstorm and develop creative furniture design concepts.
  • Develop furniture designs from concept through prototyping to final production.
  • Communicate research findings, design ideas, and design rationale clearly through visuals and presentations.
  • Create design outputs including sketches, renderings, and 3D models.
  • Support product development, prototyping, and testing activities.
  • Work closely with the production team to ensure design specifications are accurately implemented.
  • Assist in the selection of materials, finishes, and hardware.
  • Conduct research on design trends, materials, and competitor products.
  • Maintain organised design documentation, including drawings, layouts, and specifications.
  • Assist with document management, including version control, updates, and organisation of project files in line with project milestones.
  • Review design and project documents for accuracy, consistency, and completeness.
  • Stay updated on industry trends and emerging design technologies.
  • Carry out other related duties as assigned.


Qualifications

  • Currently pursuing a degree or diploma in Furniture Design, Industrial Design, Interior Design, or a related field.
  • Strong passion for furniture design with a good eye for aesthetics and detail.
  • Proficiency in relevant design software and/or strong sketching/drawing skills.
  • Good communication and teamwork abilities.
  • Detail-oriented and comfortable handling documentation and revisions.
  • Open to feedback and able to apply it constructively.
  • Self-motivated and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment.
  • Knowledge of sustainable design principles is a plus.
  • No prior work experience required, but a strong portfolio is essential.


What We Offer

  • Hands-on experience in furniture design and manufacturing.
  • A fast-paced startup environment with real exposure and responsibility.
  • Opportunities to work on a variety of furniture design projects.
  • Skill development through real-world design-to-production experience.

title: Project Engineer
raw_description:
Job Description:

We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Project Engineer to join our AV team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in project management and technical expertise in audio-visual systems, ensuring successful project delivery from conception through completion.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Oversee and manage AV projects from initial planning through to execution and delivery, ensuring adherence to budget, schedule, and quality standards.
  • Collaborate with stakeholders, including clients and contractors, to define project requirements and deliverables.
  • Conduct site surveys and assessments to develop accurate project scopes and implementation plans.
  • Design and configure AV systems, including audio, video, and control systems, tailored to client specifications.
  • Coordinate with internal teams and subcontractors to ensure seamless integration of AV systems into existing infrastructure.
  • Monitor project progress and provide regular updates to stakeholders, addressing any issues or delays proactively.
  • Ensure compliance with industry standards, safety regulations, and company policies throughout all phases of the project.
  • Provide technical support and training to clients after project completion to ensure satisfaction and usability of AV systems.
  • Perform preventive maintenance

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics, AV Technology, or a related field.
  • Proven experience in project engineering/management, specifically within the AV industry.
  • Strong technical knowledge of audio-visual systems , installation, and troubleshooting.
  • Proficient in project management tools.
  • Excellent organizational skills, with the ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills for effective client and team collaboration.
  • Good soldering skill on audio & video connectivity

What We Offer:

  • Competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package.
  • Opportunities for advancement and professional development.
  • A collaborative work environment with a dynamic team.

title: PLC Control Engineer (Marine Automation)
raw_description:
Our client is a Marine and Offshore Industry. Due to business needs, they are now recruiting a PLC Control Engineer to be part of their Team for ongoing transformation projects. They are located in the West - easily accessible.

Responsibilities:

  • Design and develop green marine solutions aligned with the company’s sustainability and business objectives

raw_title: Sr. Capital Category Supplier Manager II
title: Sr. Capital Category Supplier Manager II
raw_description:
As a Sr Capital Category Supplier Manager II, you will be the primary category point of contact for supplier interactions, performance management, and negotiations globally. You will lead in the development and implementation of category strategies and projects related but not limited to cost reduction initiatives, supply base optimization, and pricing/contract negotiation!

Category Management & Strategic Sourcing

  • Develop and implement Category Strategy for Capital Equipment

  • Perform Market analysis including supplier landscape, capabilities, and technology roadmaps

  • Participate in supplier segmentation and strategic goal setting to improve value such as high revenue, spend reduction, purchasing efficiency, customer services, and supplier management

  • Recommend resource levels across procurement sourcing categories, projects, and functions

  • Drive sourcing requirements and supplier selection through decision matrix in support of technology development, cost reduction, performance improvement efforts, and sustainability

  • Facilitate co-development activities and collaboration with suppliers

  • Implement processes to manage partner well-being with key suppliers

Cost Management & Analysis

  • Identify and evaluate category-specific savings and revenue levers

  • Drive category savings and revenue and scorecard metric targets

  • Provide market intelligence and category price trends to relevant internal partners

  • Use cost modeling techniques to negotiate for assigned categories based on global benchmarks.

Negotiation

  • Lead and partner with collaborators in negotiations with suppliers for strategic sourcing events/RFQ process into bundled negotiation

  • Lead or participate in negotiations for contract extensions and renewals, renegotiation of prices, transfers, etc.

  • Incorporate savings targets and contract requirements into negotiations

  • Build and negotiate supplier contracts in assigned categories, monitoring and implementing terms to improve cost performance and drive successful business engagement.

Business Partnering

  • Partner with Customers to deliver Strategic Solutions for the assigned categories

  • Develop and maintain expertise in the assigned spending categories through relationships with key partners

  • Interact with Micron and Supplier executives

  • Drive customer-centric approach to solving issues and representing Procurement

Minimum Qualifications:

  • Minimum 5-8 years of experience in Procurement and Engineering

  • A bachelor’s degree in engineering business

  • Proficiency in Probe and Test Processes and Capital Procurement

  • Experienced in a Category Management role, preferably in the semiconductor or high-tech industry

  • Demonstrate experience in Strategic Sourcing

  • Strong in Negotiation and Communication skills

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Certified Purchasing Manager or CPSN Certification

title: Physiotherapist #78819
raw_description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Physiotherapy Clinic
  • Position Title: Physiotherapist
  • Working Location: Orchard
  • Working Hours: 5 days (Mon – Fri, 9.00am – 6.00pm)
  • Salary Package: Basic salary up to $6,000 + Variable Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent Role

Key Responsibilities

  • Consulting with patients to assess their physical conditions and learn more about their symptoms and challenges
  • Reviewing patients’ medical history and referrals from surgeons, GPs, occupational therapists and other healthcare workers
  • Planning, customizing and implementing a treatment program for patients
  • Administering treatment including use of hands-on techniques (joint mobilization, deep tissue release etc.), use of modalities and exercise prescription to relieve pain and improve the patients' mobility
  • Educating patients and/or their caregivers on injury prevention and how to manage physical conditions at home
  • May be required to carry out home visits on a limited basis
  • Keeping detailed patient records in the Jane Clinic Management System, updating treatment plans when needed and complying with government physiotherapy regulations
  • Advising on lifestyle changes and workplace accommodations
  • Cross referring as necessary to other professionals within team, orthopedic surgeons or sports doctors, and other health professionals
  • Staying up to date with the latest research and advancements in physiotherapy
  • Willingness to learn and grow and develop knowledge and skills to assess and analyse patients holistically, to take a patient from the rehabilitative stage through to pain-free movement and optimal function
  • Complying with regulations and maintaining high standards of patient care
  • May be required to produce progress and medical reports on the patient’s treatment and rehabilitation plan e.g. for insurance purposes

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Minimum Bachelor's degree in Physiotherapy, or a related field.
  • Interest and experience in the area of musculoskeletal and orthopaedic physiotherapy.
  • Candidates should have minimum 3 years working experience as a physiotherapist.
  • AHPC certified in Singapore (does not require AHPC supervision).
  • Team player, willing to make contributions to the team in terms of professional support and education, cross-referrals, social activities, creative ideas and social media marketing.
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills, with passion and ability to work with patients from diverse cultural background and nationalities.

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

Qualifications:

  • Singaporean / Singapore PR preferred
  • Minimum 21 years old with Polytechnic Diploma, GCE 'A' level Certification or Bachelor Degree in any field, as per MAS requirements.
  • Highly motivated with strong interpersonal skills

title: Mathematics Teacher
raw_description:
About Us:

Kangaroo Learning Centre Pte Ltd (“KLC”) was established in Singapore in May 2022 as part of the Fang Tian Education Group, a leading education institution founded in 2014 in China, which serves over 100,000 students annually.


We are one of Singapore’s fastest-growing math tuition centres. Out of 4000 students who participated in the Singapore Mathematical Olympiad (SMO), 118 students were invited for Rounds 2 and 51 are from our learning center. We are also the only centre in Singapore that offers parent sit-in during classes, a flexible refund policy, and a dual-teacher classroom model. Our unique approach and proven results have earned us a strong reputation among parents and students alike.


The centre offers a range of academic and enrichment programs for students of different ages, including primary and secondary school students, as well as those preparing for the PSLE, Math Olympiad, GCE ‘O’-Level and ‘A’-Level examinations.


At KLC, there's no office politics — we value direct, honest communication and a results-driven mindset. We’re not just looking for employees, but co-partners who are eager to grow with us, take initiative, and play an active role in building something meaningful together.


Job Overview:

At Kangaroo Learning Centre (KLC), our mission is to develop the best teachers in Singapore. We provide comprehensive training and a one-on-one mentorship program led by experienced senior teachers and management. Whether you're just starting out or looking to grow further, you'll receive the guidance, support, and structured development needed to thrive. Join us and build a rewarding teaching career with a clear path toward excellence, leadership, and long-term growth.


Job Responsibilities:

  • Create an interactive, inquiry-based, and student-centred classroom environment that guides and motivates students to enjoy learning mathematics.
  • Communicate closely with students, provide timely feedback to parents, and proactively support students in their learning.
  • Participate in center branding activities such as YouTube content creation, article writing and sharing, etc.
  • Familiarity with the question-setting patterns and trends of PSLE, O-Level, A-Level, and Math Olympiad competitions (e.g., RMO, APMOPS, NMOS, SMO) is an added advantage.
  • Support and participate in any teaching-related tasks and team activities assigned by the centre.

Job Requirements:

  • A bachelor’s degree or above from an accredited university (e.g., NUS, NTU, SMU, or equivalent).
  • Candidates without experience are welcome to apply.
  • Open to all nationalities (Sponsored for work passes)
  • No prior teaching experience required — comprehensive training and mentorship will be provided.
  • Responsible, adaptable, and willing to continuously learning.
  • Excellent interpersonal, verbal, and written communication skills, with a positive, collaborative attitude and a strong passion for working closely with students, parents, and colleagues.
  • Able to commit weekdays (inc. evenings) & weekends (Note: Most student classes are held on weekends)


What We Offer

  • Performance-based salary reviews — high-performing teachers may receive salary of up to S$11,960 per month.
  • Additional S$1,000 monthly Guaranteed Teaching Allowance will be paid during the first 3 months probationary period.
  • The first year S$50,000 Guaranteed Annual Salary. We top up the balance if you didn’t get S$50,000 annual salary in the first year.
  • Structured one-on-one mentorship and coaching.
  • Comprehensive training — perfect for those starting their teaching career.
  • Dual career progression paths provided — grow into either a senior teaching expert or move towards leadership and management roles.
  • Opportunities to be involved in content creation, curriculum development, conducting activities with students and parents, and team leadership.

title: Project Engineer
raw_description:
An EPC Solar PV System Integrator providing technologies solutions in Engineering, Design, Procurement, Construction, Testing and Commissioning, Operations and Maintenance of Solar Energy Systems from concept to completion.

Responsibilities:

  • The candidate has to lead the execution solar projects including procurement, supervision of subcontractor with the following tasks:
  • Conduct detailed site survey and modify solar PV system designs that meet client requirements, local codes, and industry standards.
  • Optimise system layout for maximum energy production and cost-effectiveness.
  • Conduct shading analysis and assess site suitability for solar installations.
  • Develop bill of materials (BOM) for projects.
  • Use modelling software to predict system performance and energy output.
  • Prepare and submit permit applications, ensuring compliance with local regulations and utility requirements.
  • Coordinate with regulatory authorities to secure necessary approvals.
  • Develop and implement quality control procedures for solar installations.
  • Conduct inspections to ensure system integrity and safety standards.
  • Provide technical guidance and support to installation teams during system setup.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues as they arise.
  • Create and maintain accurate and detailed project documentation, including schematics, drawings, and technical manuals.
  • Manage manpower and ensure project run smoothly.
  • Monitor and ensure systems are operating optimally before handing over to clients.
  • Promote and adhere to safety protocols and ensure that all installations meet safety requirements.
  • Provide technical support for sales, proposals, and during potential client meetings.

Requirements:

  • Diploma/Degree/Certificate in Electrical/Electronic or Mechanical Engineering, Clean Energy Engineering or equivalent
  • Fresh graduates are welcome, or candidate with some experience in the relevant field
  • Candidates will undergo structured hands-on On The Job training under experienced PV Engineers 
  • Candidate must be willing to work in the Engineering and Construction industry.

Others:

  • Work location: Central region, Singapore (Near MRT)
  • 5 days’ work week

raw_description:

title: Electrical Technician (IoT Devices/ Up to $3k)
raw_description:
Job Summary

You will install, maintain, and troubleshoot IoT devices and electrical equipment on site to ensure system reliability and safety. You will conduct inspections, provide technical support during commissioning, and collaborate with production teams to maintain smooth equipment operation.

Responsibilities

  • Install and maintain IoT devices, electrical equipment, and components at various sites to ensure operational functionality
  • Perform preventive and corrective maintenance on electrical systems to reduce downtime and extend equipment life
  • Conduct site surveys and inspections to assess potential installation locations and system conditions
  • Identify and resolve faults in IoT devices and electrical systems promptly to minimize disruptions
  • Perform routine inspections and testing of electrical systems to verify safety and efficiency, documenting all test results accurately
  • Provide technical support during IoT system commissioning and startup to ensure successful implementation
  • Collaborate with production teams to troubleshoot equipment issues and maintain continuous operation
  • Follow electrical safety procedures and workplace safety regulations to maintain a safe working environment
  • Report hazards and recommend corrective actions to prevent accidents and ensure compliance

Required competencies and certifications

  • Proven experience in electrical installation works to perform safe and effective system setups
  • Knowledge of relevant workplace safety laws, regulations, and compliance standards to ensure adherence during all tasks
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team to complete projects efficiently
  • Effective communication and interpersonal skills to coordinate with team members and stakeholders
  • Excellent attention to detail to perform accurate and thorough work
  • Willingness and ability to work night shifts as required by operational needs

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • ITE certification or higher educational qualification
  • Minimum 1 year of relevant work experience in electrical or IoT system maintenance
  • Fresh graduates are encouraged to apply and will be considered

title: Core Developer
raw_description:
Virtu is a leading financial firm that leverages cutting edge technology to offer liquidity to the global markets and innovative, transparent trading solutions to our clients. As a market maker, Virtu provides deep liquidity that helps to create more efficient markets around the world. Our market structure expertise, broad diversification, and execution technology enables us to provide competitive bids and offers in over 19,000 securities, at over 235 venues, in 36 countries worldwide.

The Role:

Our Software Development team creates powerful trading tools, which facilitate the operation of a high-performance system, deployed in financial marketplaces around the world. The Core development role focuses on the design of our trading system’s core order management protocol, managing internal messaging processing and well as connectivity to external trading destinations.

Key Skills:

  • Mastery of modern C++ programming
  • Experience with Java programming
  • Extensive experience developing in a Linux environment
  • Experience working with complex networking infrastructure (i.e. how data transverses a network, TCP, UDP, etc.)
  • Strong understanding of computer performance analysis
  • Experience programming in high transaction environments and low-latency systems
  • Experience in distributed and/or highly concurrent systems is a plus
  • Experience in low-latency systems and/or high transaction environments is a plus
  • Interest in trading and financial markets
  • Enjoy working in a fast-paced, dynamic environment
  • Excellent communication skills are required
  • Candidates outside banking and finance preferred
  • Talented graduates will be considered


THE PROCESS

After passing an application screening, candidates will be sent an online programming test via email from a service called HackerRank as a first step of the process. This is to gain an understanding of the candidates coding ability.


Virtu Financial is an equal opportunity employer, committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace, welcoming you for who you are and does not discriminate on the basis of race, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, or other legally protected status.

raw_description:
We are seeking a skilled IoT Engineer to design, develop, and maintain Internet of Things (IoT) solutions that connect devices, sensors, and systems to deliver real-time data and actionable insights. The ideal candidate has a strong background in embedded systems, networking, cloud platforms, data integration and related programming skills, with a passion for building scalable, secure IoT architectures.

Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and deploy end-to-end IoT solutions (devices, gateways, cloud, and applications)

title: Accounts Executive (Full Set)
raw_description:
About the Role
The incumbent will support daily full-set accounting operations and partner with the offshore Batam finance team to ensure accuracy, timeliness, and operational excellence in financial transactions.

Reporting to the Assistant Finance Manager, this role focuses on hands-on accounting work, coordination, and follow-up to support month-end closing, reporting, and compliance requirements with the relevant stakeholders.

Key Responsibilities

Accounting Operations

  • Handle daily accounting activities including posting/review of sales invoices, purchase invoices, payments, receipts, and journal entries.
  • Perform reconciliations for bank accounts, e-commerce platforms, accounts receivable/payable, and intercompany balances.
  • Support month-end and year-end closing activities to ensure accurate and timely reporting.
  • Assist in the timely preparation and submission of GST returns in compliance with Singapore tax regulations.
  • Maintain proper filing of accounting records and supporting documents.
  • Work closely with the offshore Batam team to ensure daily accounting tasks are completed accurately and on time.
  • Follow up on outstanding items, discrepancies, and documents with internal stakeholders (e.g. Sales, Operations, Procurement).
  • Escalate unresolved issues to the Assistant Finance Manager when required.

Reporting & Audit Support

  • Assist in preparing financial reports and schedules for management review.
  • Support internal and external audits by preparing documents and responding to queries.
  • Follow established accounting procedures and suggest process improvements where applicable.

Requirements

  • Diploma in Accounting, Finance, LCCI, or a related field; candidates pursuing ACCA are welcome to apply.
  • 1–2 years of relevant accounting experience; fresh graduates with relevant internship experience may be considered.
  • Good understanding of accounting principles and Singapore tax regulations, including GST.
  • Familiar with Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central Accounting Software is an advantage.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel, with hands-on experience using Formulas, PivotTables and lookup functions (e.g. VLOOKUP, XLOOKUP).
  • Detail-oriented, organized, and able to follow up on tasks independently in a fast-paced environment.
  • Good communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively with internal and external stakeholders.
  • Positive learning attitude, proactiveness and accountability in assigned task.

title: Sales Engineer / Executive - Project (Marine/Offshore)
raw_description:
Key Responsibilities:

  • Business Development & Project Sales
    • Identify and develop new project opportunities within the marine, shipbuilding, and offshore sectors(shipyards, vessel owners, and M&E contractors).
    • Manage and grow existing accounts through regular engagement, technical presentations, and solution proposals.
    • Collaborate with purchasing, project, and engineering teams at client sites to specify suitable products and systems.
    • Prepare and follow up on quotations, tenders, and project bids to ensure timely conversion.
    • Track project pipelines and forecast sales performance.


  • Technical & Commercial Support
    • Understand client technical requirements and recommend the right solutions (e.g. explosion-proof lighting, cable systems, control panels, or heat tracing).
    • Liaise with engineering and procurement teams internally to ensure technical compliance and pricing accuracy.
    • Support post-sales coordination—delivery, documentation, commissioning, and after-sales service.


  • Market Intelligence
    • Monitor competitor activities, market trends, and upcoming projects.
    • Provide feedback on new product opportunities and potential business collaborations.


  • Customer Relationship Management
    • Maintain long-term relationships with shipyard buyers, project managers, and contractors.
    • Represent the company professionally at exhibitions, trade shows, and networking events in the marine industry.


  • Experience:
    • 1–5 years of experience in marine or industrial project sales.
    • Exposure to electrical, lighting, instrumentation, or safety systems preferred.
    • Candidates with relevant internship or fresh engineering graduates with strong interest in sales are welcome to apply (for junior executive level).
  • Skills:
    • Strong technical aptitude with good communication and presentation skills.
    • Result-driven with good negotiation and relationship-building ability.
    • Ability to read basic engineering drawings or specifications is advantageous.
    • Proficient in MS Office and comfortable with CRM tools.

title: Banking Sales Associate
raw_description:
Responsibilities:


1. Customer Engagement:

- Build and maintain strong relationships with customers.

- Provide excellent customer service and address inquiries regarding financial products and services.

- Actively engage in cross-selling and upselling financial products to meet sales targets.


2. Product Knowledge:

- Stay updated on the bank's products and services.

- Effectively communicate product features and benefits to customers.

- Assist customers in selecting the right banking products to meet their financial needs.


3. Sales Targets:

- Achieve and exceed monthly sales targets.

- Identify opportunities for revenue generation and actively pursue them.

- Collaborate with team members to enhance overall sales performance.


4. Documentation and Processing:

- Assist customers in completing necessary documentation for various financial transactions.

- Ensure accuracy and compliance with financial regulations in all customer interactions.

- Process the forwarding of account openings, loan applications, and other financial transactions efficiently.


5. Compliance:

- Stay informed about and adhere to all relevant banking/ financial regulations and compliance standards.

- Ensure that all customer interactions and transactions comply with internal policies and external regulations.


6. Problem Resolution:

- Address and resolve customer issues and complaints in a timely and effective manner.

- Collaborate with other departments to resolve complex customer inquiries.


7. Team Collaboration:

- Work closely with team members to achieve overall goals.

- Participate in team meetings and contribute to a positive team environment.


8. Market Research:

- Stay informed about industry trends, market conditions, and competitor offerings.

- Provide feedback to management regarding customer preferences and market demands.


9. Training and Development:

- Participate in ongoing training programs to enhance product knowledge and sales skills.

- Share insights and best practices with team members to improve overall performance.



Qualifications:

- Local diploma or A Levels; bachelor's degree in business or related field is a plus.

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills.

- Knowledge of banking products and services.

- Ability to work in a target-driven environment.

- Attention to detail and strong organizational skills.

title: Cyber Security Engineer
raw_description:
URGENTLY HIRING CYBER SECURITY ENGINEER

RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Conduct relevant awareness training/survey/quizzes on security, protocols and procedure and providing helpful references;

  • Conduct IT security risk assessment; identify exploitable weakness and implement resolution to secure our infrastructure and applications to protect the digital assets and data;

  • Manage vulnerability assessment, penetration testing and security audit;

  • Responsible for maintaining and implementing security framework, policies, processes/procedures and guidelines;

  • Monitoring and detecting software and system for intrusion or irregular behavior and abnormalities; isolates, blocks and removes unauthorized access;

  • Respond immediately to security incidents, escalate, investigate and mitigate; and provide post-incident analysis report;

  • Keep up-to-date on the latest security vulnerabilities, research and recommend mitigation measures

REQUIREMENTS

  • A recognized diploma/degree in Computer Science, Engineering or related field

  • Professional certification related to IT security preferred

  • At least 2+ year experience in IT Security role

  • Good knowledge on security frameworks (e.g ISO/IEC 27001, NIST Cybersecurity framework), risk management methodologies and latest top 10 OWASP vulnerabilities

  • Good knowledge of patch management, firewalls, and intrusion detection/prevention systems, web security, end user security and secured network protocols

  • Strong team player

Interested candidates, who wish to apply for the advertised position, please email us an updated copy of your resume.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

raw_title: Algorithm Engineer Graduate (TikTok Shop Global E-Commerce, Supply Chain and Logistics) - 2026 Start (BS/MS)
title: Algorithm Engineer Graduate (TikTok Shop Global E-Commerce, Supply Chain and Logistics) - 2026 Start (BS/MS)
raw_description:
About TikTok

TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.​

Why Join Us

Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.​

We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.​

​

Diversity & Inclusion​

TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.​

Job highlights

Yoga and fitness, Stock options, Positive team atmosphere, Career growth opportunity, Paid leave, Flat organization, 100+ mil users, Industry experts, Competitive compensation, Flexible hours

Responsibilities

Team Introduction

Our mission is to optimize the variety & cost-saving of assortments and the speed & quality of fulfillment to ensure the user experience of global e-commerce services.

- Build global logistic and warehousing network, improve operations efficiency and reduce operational cost with data analysis, machine learning and operation research methods.

- Create supply chain's data portrait and knowledge graph in various dimensions such as vendors, commodity, place of origin, inventory, production capacity and quality of fulfillment, etc. Predict user needs in different countries and regions, guide inventory preparation and fulfillment, and implement effective pricing. From a comprehensive B-C perspective, optimize platform efficiency and enhance user experience through diverse supply chain collaboration means.

- Optimize merchant/merchandise supply. Mine high-quality global merchant leads, establish outreach and conversion mechanism to drive merchant growth, and provide continuous incubation and support after merchant onboard. Track international e-commerce trends and TT content trends, identify best-selling product leads and improve the supply of high-quality and affordable goods. Collaborate with the supply chain system to build systematic product growth and operation capabilities.

We are looking for talented individuals to join our team in 2026. As a graduate, you will get opportunities to pursue bold ideas, tackle complex challenges, and unlock limitless growth. Launch your career where inspiration is infinite at TikTok.

Successful candidates must be able to commit to an onboarding date by end of year 2026. Please state your availability and graduation date clearly in your resume.

Candidates can apply to a maximum of two positions and will be considered for jobs in the order you apply. The application limit is applicable to TikTok and its affiliates' jobs globally. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis - we encourage you to apply early.

Responsibilities

- Responsible for the development of deep learning and operations research models and related intelligent systems for the supply chain and logistics of the global E-Commerce business.

- Utilize e-commerce big data and deep learning models to predict end-to-end estimated time of arrival (ETA), and some logistics events such as failed delivery, delivered but not received to enhance the user logistics experience. Build logistics network knowledge graphs and predict the spatio-temporal trajectory sequence of express packages through deep learning, statistical inference and other algorithmic methods. Use NLP and LLM algorithms to handle address problems such as address verification and address suggestion.

- Utilize time series forecasting techniques to predict sales at different granularities and horizons, such as warehouse-level manpower forecasting, inventory-level demand forecasting etc. We need strong machine learning and deep learning skills to detect important factors and model the relationship between the future and history.

- Participate in the development of merchant and merchanise related algorithm systems including potential merchants mining, tiering and outreach, seller growth diagnosis and seller mission recommendation system, etc. Work closely with e-commerce supply related operation teams and product teams to achieve the growth goal of e-commerce business.

- Based on the massive e-commerce related information mined from different resources, predict the traffic/conversion performance of merchandises using different kinds of machine learning methods, improve the efficiency of merchandise operation strategy and pricing/subsidy strategy, and assist in optimizing traffic distribution. And finally achieve the goal of merchandise growth under certain cost/profit target at the same time.

Qualifications

Minimum Qualifications

- Final year graduates in Computer Science, engineering or quantitative field.

- Proficient in machine learning and statistics, familiar with the principles and model structures of common machine learning and deep learning algorithms for classification, regression, and clustering, with practical application experience.

- Proficient in programming languages such as Python/Java, possessing excellent coding abilities, and familiar with at least one common machine learning/deep learning framework (TensorFlow/PyTorch etc.).

Preferred Qualifications

- Demonstrates a spirit of exploration, outstanding data analysis capabilities, strong initiative, and excellent teamwork and communication skills.

- Bonus points for having published papers at conferences such as KDD, NeurIPS, WWW, SIGIR, WSDM, ICML, IJCAI, AAAI, RecSys, or having participated in data mining/machine learning competitions.

By submitting an application for this role, you accept and agree to our global applicant privacy policy, which may be accessed here: https://careers.tiktok.com/legal/privacy

If you have any questions, please reach out to us at apac-earlycareers@tiktok.com

title: Operations Officer (Banking – Cards)
raw_description:
About Us

Green Link Digital Bank is Singapore's inaugural wholesale digital bank focusing on supply chain finance, mainly serving MSMEs and aiming to help MSMEs grow and improve digitization.
We are looking for an Operations Officer to grow our business and manage our Card Issuing business.
Responsibilities

  • Card Lifecycle Management: Manage the end-to-end card issuance lifecycle, including card embossing files generation, digital card provisioning, PIN management, card renewals, and replacements.
  • Corporate Client Onboarding: Review and process Corporate Card applications, ensuring strict adherence to KYC/KYB (Know Your Business) requirements and internal credit policies.
  • Vendor Management: Act as a liaison with card personalization bureaus to ensure timely printing and delivery of physical cards to customers.
  • Settlement & Reconciliation: Perform daily clearing and settlement reconciliation with payment schemes (VISA/Mastercard) and internal General Ledger (GL) accounts. Investigate and resolve settlement breaks.
  • Dispute Resolution (Chargebacks): Manage the end-to-end dispute resolution process. Review customer transaction disputes, initiate chargebacks where applicable, and ensure compliance with VISA/Mastercard dispute timelines and regulations.
  • Fraud Monitoring: Monitor real-time transaction alerts using fraud detection tools; contact customers regarding suspicious activity and block/unblock cards as necessary.
  • Process Improvement: Help establish Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for the new Card business. Identify gaps in the Card Management System (CMS) and work with Product teams to implement the fixes (UAT support).
  • Reporting: Prepare regulatory and management reports regarding card issuance volumes, transaction spend, active rates and fraud losses.
  • Other responsibilities: Performing daily, weekly and monthly reconciliation of Nostro and Securities Custody accounts.

Requirements

  • Bachelor's degree in Banking, Finance, or equivalent.
  • Minimum 4 years of prior work experience in similar function in banking industry.
  • Strong awareness of KYC/AML regulations and full understanding of Risks and Control requirements.
  • Strong working compliance knowledge in card operations.
  • Strong working knowledge of applicable card products and best practices of card processes.
  • Excellent communication skills with ability to multi-task while staying detailed oriented and having effective time management skill.
  • Ability to work independently while being an effective team player, with ability to manage work under pressure.
  • Technological orientation with proficiency in MS Excel VBA an added advantage.


By submitting your application, you have given your consent for us to collect, use and retain your data for a year as according to our prevailing data retention and PDPA policies. Should you have any enquiries on our data policy, please contact us at CustomerSupport@glbank.com.

title: Admin & Business Intern
raw_description:
Role Overview:
We are looking for an enthusiastic Admin & Business Intern to support our team with day-to-day administrative tasks and business operations. This internship offers an opportunity to gain practical experience in administration, operations, and business management while working closely with our management team.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Assist with general administrative tasks, including data entry, filing, and document management.

  • Support scheduling, meeting coordination, and calendar management.

  • Assist in preparing reports, presentations, and business documents.

  • Help monitor and track ongoing projects, orders, and operational workflows.

  • Communicate with suppliers, clients, and internal teams as needed.

  • Conduct research on market trends, competitors, or potential business opportunities.

  • Assist in organizing company events, promotions, or campaigns.

  • Perform ad-hoc tasks to support the management team.

Requirements:

  • Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Business Administration, Management, Marketing or related field.

  • Strong organizational and time-management skills.

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) or Google Workspace.

  • Detail-oriented and able to handle multiple tasks efficiently.

  • Positive attitude, proactive, and willing to learn.

What You Will Gain:

  • Hands-on experience in business administration and operations.

  • Exposure to real-world business processes and decision-making.

  • Opportunity to work closely with experienced professionals.

How to Apply:
Please send your resume to aezoom@begasso.sg with the subject line: “Admin & Business Intern Application – [Your Name]” or whatsapp to +6581827692. Thank you!

title: Intern (Product & Growth)
raw_description:
Company Overview:

Mitrade is an award-winning global Contract for Difference (CFD) and forex broker, regulated by authorities in Australia (ASIC), Cyprus (CySec), the Cayman Islands (CIMA), and Mauritius (FSC). We were founded in Melbourne, Australia and have offices worldwide.

Leveraging our proprietary in-house state-of-the-art technology, Mitrade has developed a one-stop digital trading platform tailored for investors. We offer market data, news and analysis, as well as trading and risk management services within a comprehensive user-centric FinTech ecosystem.

Serving over six million users worldwide, Mitrade offers unmatched accessibility across mobile (iOS and Android), desktop, and web platforms.

Role Summary:

We are looking for a detail-oriented intern to join our team in Singapore. You will get hands-on experience analysing quantitative and qualitative data and identifying product and operational solutions to accelerate our growth.  

What Would Be Your Responsibilities:

  • Analyse performance data to identify opportunities for improvement
  • Propose solutions and assist with drafting product requirements based on data, competitor benchmarking and business feedback in order to boost user growth
  • Coordinate between China-based development and overseas regulated entities, ensuring seamless integration of international business requirements.
  • Conduct user acceptance testing

What We Require From You: 

  • Bachelor’s degree in business, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
  • Self-starter equipped with a strong business acumen to drive for commercial results
  • Exceptional analytical skills, able to think logically and independently
  • Ability to communicate clearly and effectively through presentations and/ or other means to stakeholders of different levels
  • Proficiency in English and Mandarin (to work with stakeholders who converse only in Mandarin)

What You Can Look Forward To:

  • A flat organizational structure that values collaboration and transparency

title: Network Engineers
raw_description:
About Apeiro Networks: 

Apeiro Networks is a leading network infrastructure solutions provider with a distinctive foothold in Asia, known for our premium approach to hardware and software integration. Our expertise lies in delivering cutting edge solutions across DWDM, Metro Ethernet, and Time & Synchronization technologies, supporting businesses in building resilient and scalable networks that drive connectivity and precision.

Position Summary: 

We are currently seeking a dynamic Network Engineers to join our Singapore team. This role provides hands-on support in the deployment and maintenance of optical network systems. The individual will assist in the installation, configuration, and testing of key network components, support site surveys, contribute to troubleshooting efforts under the guidance of senior engineers, and ensure accurate documentation of network activities. Continuous learning through training and self-study is encouraged to build technical proficiency in optical networking technologies and best practices.

Key Responsibilities: 

  • Assist in installing, configuring, commissioning and testing optical network equipment, including switches, multiplexers, amplifiers, and transceivers.
  • Support in conducting site surveys to assess optical network requirements, evaluate existing infrastructure, and identify potential challenges.
  • Assist in troubleshooting optical network issues, under the guidance of senior engineers, to identify root causes and implement effective solutions.
  • Assist in maintaining accurate documentation of all installation, maintenance, and troubleshooting activities, diagrams, test reports, and equipment inventories.
  • Participate in training programs and self-study to enhance knowledge and skills in optical networking technologies and best practices.

Qualifications & Skills Required: 

  • Degree or Diploma in Electrical Engineering, IT, or a related field.
  • Good interpersonal, communication, analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Able and willing to work under pressure and tight schedule
  • Strong interest in learning and developing skills in networking technologies. Training will be provided.
  • Fresh graduates are welcomed

How to Apply: 

Interested candidates should submit their resume and a cover letter explaining their relevant experience to hr@apeironetworks.com. Please use "Network Engineers" as the subject line.

Join Apeiro Networks: 

If you’re passionate about the future of network infrastructure and eager to help clients achieve their connectivity goals, we’d love to hear from you. Join Apeiro Networks and be part of a team dedicated to delivering excellence across Asia’s telecommunications landscape.
