title: Application Systems Manager (Slate)
raw_description:
Salary: Up to $7500
Location: Pioneer
Period: 1 year

  • System Configuration and Management: Maintain and customise the Slate database,design, and update application forms, incorporate validation checks on data entry, build automation rules, and manage portals for applicants and staff to ensure a smooth user experience.
  • Support for CRM & Other Technologies: Can support CRM and other technological systems as required, including assisting with configuration, troubleshooting, and system implementation once the Slate setup is complete.
  • Data Management: Oversee data imports, exports, cleansing, and ensure seamless integration with campus systems such as the Student Information System (SIS) and university payment gateway.
  • Reporting and Analytics: Develop complex queries, dashboards, and scheduled reports to provide insights for decision-making and monitor key performance metrics.
  • Communications and Events: Manage multi-channel communications, create personalised templates, and coordinate event communications and scheduling.
  • User Support and Strategic Planning: Collaborate with stakeholders to understand their needs and translate them into technical solutions. Lead user training, develop documentation, stay current with platform updates, and troubleshoot technical issues as the primary support contact with Technolutions.

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Business, or related fields.
  • At least 2 years of practical experience implementing Technolutions Slate CRM

title: Administration & Operations Executive - WCAN
raw_description:
Responsibilities:

  • Manage confidential student and assessment data in the student and learning management systems.
  • Prepare and coordinate all assessments, including quizzes, class tests, and exams, ensuring proper planning and documentation.
  • Liaise with faculty and module leaders to review and finalize assessment materials before administration.
  • Plan and allocate resources, including booking venues and assigning staff for assessment support.
  • Maintain accurate assessment schedules and ensure all materials are prepared for on-campus or online assessments.
  • Brief and coordinate staff to ensure smooth administration of assessments.
  • Oversee the conduct of assessments, ensuring procedures are followed and addressing any issues that arise.
  • Manage post-assessment processes, including tracking marking timelines, liaising with faculty for moderation, and updating student records.
  • Prepare and coordinate meetings with relevant boards or committees, ensuring all required documentation is complete.
  • Handle assessment-related administrative tasks, procurement, and finance matters according to timelines.
  • Support the launch of new programs by planning initial assessments and drafting operational workflows.
  • Liaise with internal and external stakeholders to establish clear processes and timelines for assessments.
  • Coordinate with outsourced partners to monitor and track operational processes.
  • Assign and deploy staff for online and on-campus assessment support.
  • Perform any other duties as assigned by the reporting officer.


Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in any field.
  • 1–2 years of relevant experience is a plus; entry-level candidates are welcome to apply.
  • Experience in examination management, academic operations, or a similar administrative environment is preferred.
  • Excellent organizational and multitasking abilities.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills to liaise effectively with various stakeholders.
  • Detail-oriented with the ability to maintain accurate records.
  • Capable of prioritizing workload and meeting deadlines.
  • Able to work under pressure during peak assessment periods.
  • Willing to work 1–2 hours beyond regular working hours on weekdays or Saturdays when requested.


We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.

EA Personnel: Nyon Hock Sen (Aden)

title: (NEW! ) 2-Hours Career Clarity: A Real-World Exploration Workshop
raw_description:
Location @ Manulife Tower (Nearest MRT: Telok Ayer Station or Raffles Place)
11 February 2026, Wednesday
7pm to 9pm (2 hours)
Refreshments Provided

Feeling uncertain about your career direction?
Whether you’re stepping into your first job or rethinking your next move, most people face the same question: “How do I choose a career I won’t regret later?”
This workshop will be a guided, real-world exploration designed to help you gain clarity before making long-term career decisions.

Why Join?
Instead of sitting and listening, you’ll take part in guided activities that help you reflect, discuss, and discover:
✅ Explore Career Trade-Offs – Understand the real fears and realities of employed roles vs self-employed careers and which risks you’re personally more comfortable managing.
✅ Real-Life Decision Simulation – Step into real-world scenarios people face and experience how career outcomes (including income and responsibility) are created.
✅ Self-Fit & Lifestyle Reflection – Clarify what kind of work, structure, and lifestyle fits you best at this stage of life.
✅ Behind-the-Scenes Industry Insights – Get an honest look at how modern financial advisory careers actually work — beyond stereotypes.
✅ Enjoy a Refreshing Experience – Engage in meaningful discussions while enjoying complimentary refreshments!

Who Should Attend?
✅ Fresh graduates exploring career directions
✅ Working professionals considering a career switch
✅ Individuals who want clarity before committing years to a path

Important Information:

  • Registration starts 20 minutes before the event! Please arrive on time.
  • Each participant will receive a $40 cash transport token at the end of the workshop.
  • This is a physical event. No zoom session will be conducted.
  • Participants may register for only ONE session. If you have attended this workshop before, we kindly ask you to allow new participants to join. Thank you for your understanding.

Requirements:
✅ 21 years old and above
✅ Fresh Graduates, Part-Time Students, Homemakers looking for job flexibility or Mid-Career Switch
✅ Minimum A Levels, Diploma or Degree Holders

Seats are limited! Come with curiosity, leave with clarity. Please register below to secure your seat, refreshments only provided for registered attendees.

title: Conveyancing Lawyer
raw_description:
We are a boutique conveyancing law firm that is seeking to hire talented lawyers to join our dynamic legal team. We're seeking individuals who are passionate about law and have a strong desire to work in a challenging and dynamic environment.

Responsibilities:

  • Conducting legal research and drafting legal documents
  • Meeting with clients and discussing legal matters with them
  • Reviewing land registry documents
  • Drafting and reviewing contracts, agreements, and leases related to property transactions
  • Handle and advising clients full range conveyancing matters such as purchase & sales, development projects, mortgages, transfers, leases, powers of attorney, stamp duties and etc. for HDB residential properties, HDB shophouses, private residential properties and commercial/industrial/JTC properties
  • Assisting senior lawyers with complex cases
  • Developing legal strategies for clients

Requirements:

  • Bachelor's degree in Law
  • Valid license to practice law
  • Excellent oral and written communication skills
  • Ability to work under pressure
  • Strong attention to detail
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Meticulous, well-organized and can work well under time constraints
  • Qualified solicitors with no experience in Conveyancing work are also invited to apply

Benefits:

  • Competitive Salary
  • Health Insurance
  • Professional Growth Opportunities
  • Opportunities for further education and training
  • Work life balance working environment

At our law firm, we believe in providing our team members with a supportive and inclusive work environment where they have the tools and resources they need to succeed. We foster a culture of teamwork, collaboration, and excellence, and we're committed to helping our employees grow both personally and professionally.

If you're a skilled conveyancing lawyer who is looking for a challenging and fulfilling career in the legal profession, we'd love to hear from you. title: R&D Hardware Design Engineer
raw_description:
Job Description

Do you demand the best from your professional career? Are you inspired by excellence? At Hewlett Packard Enterprise, you will have the power to make the most out of your career. Hewlett Packard Enterprise is one of the world’s largest and most successful IT Companies. We are successful not just because of the technology solutions that we deliver, but also because of our core values and the amazing people that we have. We invest in our employees’ personal growth & development in an environment that will challenge and reward them. Hewlett Packard Enterprise is filled with energetic people, sparking technology revolutions and creating the future to help improve the lives of every customer.

Networking is one of the fastest growing businesses within Hewlett Packard Enterprise and offers opportunities to gain experience with leading edge technologies. Aruba, a Hewlett Packard Enterprise company, offers a comprehensive open and standards-based portfolio designed to address a broad range of customer segments, from small & medium businesses, to the largest enterprises with advanced requirements for leading branch, campus LAN and data center solutions. Aruba’s innovative technology and open, standards-based approach to networking is resonating with customers around the world, and Aruba revenue exceeds the sum of its next five competitors. Here, employees leverage new technologies and innovate to solve real world customer challenges.

We are currently looking for a dynamic, talented and innovative individual to be part of our high-speed digital circuit designer team developing state-of-the art networking products. Explore your career options with Aruba, together we will do something amazing!

http://www.arubanetworks.com/company/about-us

Sounds like you? Then we have the right opportunity for you!

HOW YOU WILL MAKE YOUR MARK:

As a Hardware Design Engineer, you will be part of a dynamic and highly skilled R&D team that create high quality products.

Responsibilities include being responsible for design, component selection, schematic implementation, hardware bring-up, debug and validation. You will collaborate with a multi-sited product development team to integrate your deliverables toward release of new products into production. You will also take part in conducting feasibility, design margin and validation analysis, and empirical testing on new and modified designs.

ABOUT YOU:

  • Must have a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Electrical Engineering or related fields.
  • Possess good knowledge and technical understanding of both digital and analog circuit design.
  • Good analytical and problem solving skills.
  • Familiar with Cadence CAD tools.
  • Knowledgeable of programming languages such as Python, Perl and Matlab.

ADDITIONAL PREFERRED ABILITIES

  • Outstanding interpersonal skills, with ability to work in teams, ability to work independently and make autonomous decisions when necessary, experience as a team player, and willing to take on a variety of projects.
  • Capability to build relationships and self-motivator.
  • Good oral and written communication skills, plus ability to read, comprehend, and explain engineering drawings and technical documents.

title: Junior System & Network Engineer
raw_description:
Ascenxus Pte Ltd is an ICT infrastructure solutions provider delivering system and network integration services for enterprise environments. We design, implement, and support infrastructure platforms that keep business systems reliable and connected.

We are looking for a Junior System & Network Integration Engineer to join our delivery team. This role is suitable for fresh graduates or early-career professionals who want hands-on experience in system and network implementation work.

Key Responsibilities:

  1. System Support - Assist in deploying and supporting Windows servers, virtual machines, and basic infrastructure components under guidance from senior engineers.
  2. Network Support - Assist in configuring and supporting LAN and WAN connectivity, IP addressing, and basic firewall or VPN setups.
  3. Integration & Implementation Work - Support system and network integration activities during project deployment, upgrades, and migrations.
  4. Operational Support - Perform Level 1 / 2 troubleshooting for system and network issues and escalate where required.
  5. Documentation & Diagrams - Maintain technical documentation, change records, and system / network diagrams.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related discipline (Fresh graduates are welcome to apply)
  • Basic understanding of computer systems and networking concepts (e.g. Windows OS, IP addressing, TCP/IP, LAN/WAN basics)
  • Exposure to Windows Server, virtualization, or networking through studies, labs, or internships is an advantage
  • Willingness to learn and work hands-on with system and network integration projects
  • Able to follow structured procedures, document work, and escalate issues clearly
  • Good attitude, sense of responsibility, and ability to work in a team environment

title: Senior/Engineer - Global Engineering Labs
raw_description:
You are responsible for new equipment introduction, risk assessment, equipment set-up, release, PM, Calibration, lab audits and as well as continuous improvement activities such as equipment reliability improvement, cost reduction, and equipment usage optimization. Through this role, you will enhance your technical skills in equipment management and improvement, project management, and strengthen your engagement and network with vendors and global GEL organizations across Micron sites.

Responsibilities:

  • Support GEL Equipment and lab operations including Internal and External audits, ESD and PM, Calibration, equipment troubleshooting, Safety and Chemical controls

  • Oversees the installation, modification, upgrade and maintenance of Engineering equipment

  • Maintains current records on equipment manufacturers’ technical notices, upgrades and safety issues. Studies equipment performance and reliability. - -- Establishes programs and solutions for increasing uptime and for equipment problems that affect the engineering process

  • Provides technical support to the engineering equipment repair and process engineering organizations. Defines and writes preventative maintenance schedules

  • Collaborate with cross functional teams on equipment requirements, space planning, facilitation, purchase and installation of equipment

  • Equipment inventory controls and critical spare parts planning

  • Coordinate external vendors on training, repair, and preventive maintenance of equipment

  • Manage external vendors expectation, set and assess goals and achievements

  • Analyze and support stakeholders’ requirements and expectations

  • Foster closer collaboration amongst cross functional teams

  • Focus on customer needs and provide timely solutions

Requirements:

  • Master's/Bachelor's degree in Electrical, Mechanical Engineering or equivalent with 2 years of relevant experience

  • Experience with Semiconductor Equipment PM, calibration, and troubleshooting

  • Experience in semiconductor manufacturing and packaging is an advantage

  • Prior Unix, ET, JIRA, Confluence, and Tableau experience preferred

  • Understanding of safety, including Ergonomics, OSHA, and Risk Assessment

  • Proficiency in statistics, data analysis, and data presentations

  • Excellent problem-solving, analytical skills, and Project management skills

  • Highly driven individual, proactive, and able to multitask and handle dynamic priorities. Good interpersonal and communication skills and a good teammate

title: Laboratory Technician (GMP Cell Culture & Processing Operations)
raw_description:
Job Title: Laboratory Technician (GMP Cell Culture & Processing Operations)

Job Description:

We are seeking a meticulous, detail-oriented, and hands-on Laboratory Technician to perform cell culture, laboratory, manufacturing and production activities in a GMP-compliant facility. The successful candidate will be responsible for executing routine laboratory and quality control procedures according to established Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) using aseptic techniques where applicable, maintaining proper documentation, assisting in commercial product manufacture and packaging, and performing other laboratory activities including but not limited to housekeeping, reagent preparation, equipment and facility maintenance.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Perform all designated activities strictly according to established SOPs and using aseptic techniques where necessary.
  • Perform cell culture and other laboratory activities including but not limited to quality control, downstream processing, and bioassays.
  • Operate and maintain cleanliness of laboratory equipment and facility.
  • Prepare, label, and document reagents according to specifications and quality standards.
  • Where necessary, assist in manufacture, dispensing, packaging and labelling of commercial products following strict instruction, ensuring product quality and safety, packaging integrity, labelling accuracy and traceability.
  • Housekeeping activities e.g. washing labware, inventory management, waste disposal
  • Maintain accurate and complete documentation in logbooks, batch records, and checklists.
  • Support environmental monitoring, inventory management, and routine equipment maintenance as needed.
  • Support continuous improvement initiatives to enhance quality, workflow, safety, and compliance.

Requisite Skills and Qualifications:

Education:

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Biotechnology, Biomedical Science, Biochemistry, or a related life science field.

Technical Skills (Optional but preferred):

Basic experience in mammalian cell culture and aseptic techniques with experience in cell culture and laboratory reagent preparation.
Basic experience in basic laboratory techniques such as aseptic techniques, pipetting, reagent preparation, and equipment operation & maintenance with sound understanding of cleanroom or biosafety practices.
Able to perform routine repetitive work with precision and consistency in controlled environments.
Able to understand and adhere to GMP/GLP concepts, documentation and compliance requirements.
Able to follow SOPs with precision, with good documentation skills and attention to detail.

Soft skills·       

  • Meticulous, disciplined, and consistent in following procedures.
  • Strong hands-on ability and able to perform repetitive tasks.
  • Able to work both collaboratively and independently under supervision and manage time effectively.
  • Quality and safety-conscious mindset
  • Organized, with good communication skills and a proactive learning attitude.
  • Able to work extended hours including holidays and weekends when required.

***Immediate availability preferred. Fresh graduates welcome to apply.

What We Offer

  • Training in GMP and aseptic processing.
  • A collaborative and supportive team in a growing biotechnology company.
  • Exposure to product manufacturing processes.
  • Career progression pathway.

How to Apply

Interested candidates are invited to submit their resume and a short cover letter to yokkim@celligenics.com or application link. Please include “Laboratory Technician Application” in the subject line.

title: Technical Sales Engineer (Technical Solutions) #78708
raw_description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Wholesales (Machinery, Equipment and Supplies)
  • Position Title: Technical Sales Engineer (Technical Solutions)
  • Working Location: Loyang Way
  • Working Hours: 5 days (Monday-Friday, 8:30AM-5:30PM)
  • Salary Package: Basic Salary + Car Allowance + VB + Medical & Dental Benefits
  • Duration: Permanent

Key Responsibilities

  • Build and maintain strong customer relationships; conduct needs assessments.
  • Provide technical consultation and solutions aligned with customer goals.
  • Identify, develop, and secure new leads within assigned territory.
  • Prepare and deliver presentations, product demos, quotations, and proposals.
  • Promote company service capabilities and drive service sales.
  • Provide post-sales support, including troubleshooting and follow-ups.
  • Coordinate with engineering and service teams for smooth project delivery.
  • Stay updated on industry trends, technologies, and competitors.
  • Share customer insights with product and marketing teams.
  • Represent the company at trade shows and seminars locally and overseas.
  • Educate and train customers/internal teams on equipment features and maintenance.
  • Support management with ad-hoc tasks as required.

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Bachelor’s degree in Engineering (Mechanical/Electrical preferred) or related field; Diploma holders considered.
  • Minimum 2 years’ experience in sales engineering, preferably in equipment sales/service.
  • Strong knowledge of vacuum pump technology or similar equipment.
  • Proficiency in technical sales and solution design.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
  • Proven track record in achieving sales targets and managing customers.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, proactive mindset.
  • Willingness to travel within Southeast Asia (30–40%).

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #78708 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.

title: Drafter
raw_description:
Job Description & Requirements

Drafter responsibilities include:

  • Liaising with architects and engineers to gather product and structural requirements and designs
  • Calculating dimensions, weight limitations, and requirements in materials
  • Describing production methods step-by-step (including equipment and software types to be used)
  • Create detailed designs with computer-aided design (CAD) software
  • Design diagrams, maps, and layouts to illustrate the workflow
  • Prepare and review rough sketches and review them along with the engineering team
  • Identify potential operational issues and redesign products to improve functionality
  • Ensure final designs comply with regulations and quality standards
  • Create manuals that describe existing products’ operation, features, and maintenance
  • Proven work experience as a Drafter or similar role
  • Hands-on experience with computer-aided design (CAD) software
  • Familiarity with 3D modeling tools
  • Good math skills
  • Ability to meet deadlines
  • BSc in Engineering, Architecture or degree from a technical college
  • An additional certification from the American Design Drafting Association (ADDA) is a plus
  • An additional certificate of Stock Management knowledge is a plus
  • The additional certificate of Quantity Survey knowledge is a plus
  • Benefit
  • Medical insurance coverage
  • Birthday treats
  • Holiday Season treats
  • Performance bonus (subject to company annual P&L)

title: HR Intern
raw_description:
The HR internship provides hands-on experience in human resources functions, offering interns the opportunity to gain practical knowledge in recruitment, employee engagement and HR operations.

Job Responsibilities

Recruitment Support

  • Manage job advertisements and career fair postings across multiple job portals to attract top talent.
  • Actively source and engage with candidates in relevant fields, assisting in screening and shortlisting applicants.
  • Organize, coordinate, and participate in recruitment campaigns such as career fairs, in-house training and workshops.

Onboarding & Offboarding Process

  • Support the onboarding process for new hires by preparing offer letters, employment contracts, and orientation schedules to ensure smooth integration into the company
  • Assist in the offboarding process for employees, including processing resignation letters, conducting exit interviews, completing offboarding checklists, and arranging logistics for their final day.

HR Reporting

  • Maintain and update accurate records, including employee files, attendance, leave applications, and other HR documentation, ensuring compliance with company policies and legal requirements.
  • Assist in crafting, documenting, and updating HR processes and job descriptions to ensure consistency and clarity.
  • Prepare HR reports and statistical data as required by the Senior HR Manager to support HR decision-making and strategy planning.

Employee Engagement

  • Help organize and support employee engagement activities such as team-building events, training sessions, workshops, and welfare programs.
  • Participate in conducting employee feedback surveys and assist in the implementation of action plans to enhance employee satisfaction and engagement..

Learning & Development:

  • Engage in training and development opportunities, including shadowing HR professionals, attending internal workshops, and gaining a deeper understanding of HR practices.

HR Projects:

  • Participate in HR-related projects or initiatives aimed at process improvement, contributing fresh ideas and gaining insights into HR strategies.

Job Requirements

  • Pursuing or recently completed a degree in HR, Business, Psychology, or related field.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple tasks.
  • Proficient in Google Suites; familiarity with HR systems is a plus.
  • Able to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information.
  • Positive attitude with a willingness to learn and take initiative.
  • Available for a minimum internship period of 3 to 6 months

Why Should You Join Us?

GREAT CULTURE AND ATMOSPHERE:

You will be working along with amazing and crazy fun people. We have cyclists, chefs, yogis, gamers, athletes, animal lovers, motivational and inspirational trainers, foodies, and many more. You’ll definitely love your #workfam.

GREAT SALARY PACKAGE AND BENEFITS:

We offer benefits which are most desired and valued by people. We believe that the people in the team are the backbone of the company, the core of everything we do. This is why we invest so much in our employee’s welfare and future.

GROWTH AND CAREER DEVELOPMENT:

The sky's the limit and we firmly believe that our employees' growth, development, and well-being are the most significant factors. We hope to grow with our employees, we want our people to shine brighter as they progress with the company.

DIVERSITY:

We value equity and inclusion. We are an equal opportunity employer who makes decisions without regard to age, identity, gender, race, colour, ethnicity, etc. We encourage our employees to be their true selves at work.

title: Trainee License Aircraft Engineer (B2 TLAE)
raw_description:
Trainee Licensed Aircraft Maintenance Engineer (TLAME)

The Licensed Aircraft Maintenance Engineer (LAME) Apprenticeship Programme is in collaboration with Temasek Polytechnic to provide the approved training, to become certified LAME with Bombardier Aerospace Services Pte. Ltd.

This Apprenticeship Programme not only offers workplace immersion programme opportunity prior to the start of Aircraft Maintenance Licence Training (AMLT) but also provide financial support and incentives to keep the engagement between the Company and trainees through the training journey.

Suitable candidates will be employed by the Company as Trainee Licensed Aircraft Maintenance Engineers (TLAMEs). Upon successfully completion of the 45 months apprenticeship and an aircraft type course, trainee will be appointed as Licensed Aircraft Maintenance Engineer, subject to trainee meeting the Company’s certifying staff requirements and CAAS personnel licensing requirements.   

Responsibilities & Expectations:

  • Perform maintenance task in compliance with Company’s policies and procedures, and relevant Aviation Authorities Rules & Regulations.
  • Practice good housekeeping in and around customer aircraft so as to maintain cleanliness at highest level at all times.
  • Prepare and upkeep equipment and tooling on daily basis.
  • Good verbal and interpersonal skills necessary to establish and maintain effective working relationships.
  • Team player, task focused and target oriented.
  • Contribute to continuous improvement to the Bombardier Service Centre Operations.

Qualifications

As our ideal candidate for Apprenticeship (Work and Study) Programme

  • You must have full-time diploma from one of the engineering fields:
    Diploma in Aerospace Engineering
    Diploma in Mechatronics
    Diploma in Mechanical Engineering
    Diploma in Manufacturing
    Diploma in Production Engineering
    Other relevant engineering diploma may apply for consideration 
  • You have graduated or Operationally Ready Date (ORD) from 2023 onwards.

When applicable, Bombardier promotes flexible and hybrid work policies. 

Why join us?

At Bombardier, we design, build and maintain the world’s peak-performing aircraft for the world’s most discerning people and businesses, governments and militaries. We have been successful in setting the highest standards by putting our people at the heart of it all, and defining excellence, together. 

Working at Bombardier means operating at the highest level. Every day, you are part of a team that delivers superior experiences and products, pushing the boundaries of what's possible in our industry and beyond. By prioritizing employee growth and development, we empower everyone to reach their full potential on their own terms, because the best work happens when you are free to be yourself and share your unique expertise.

We are seeking a hands-on and detail-oriented AV Engineer to support and manage Audio Visual projects focused on visual solutions such as digital signage, LED video walls, smart office systems, IPTV, and network infrastructure and more.

Job Objective:

raw_title: Research Assistant - Mid Size Molecule (Molecular Biology)
title: Research Assistant - Mid Size Molecule (Molecular Biology)
raw_description:
Chugai Pharmabody Research Pte. Ltd. (“CPR”) was established in Singapore as a wholly-owned subsidiary of Chugai Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd (Chugai), a member of Roche group, in January 2012 and started operations on July 2, 2012. Located at Biopolis in Singapore, it aims to generate new antibody drugs based on Chugai’s proprietary antibody engineering technologies, such as recycling antibody®, sweeping antibody®, bispecific antibody, various Fc engineered antibodies, and other new antibody engineering technologies that are under development.


Research Assistant – Mid-size Molecule Unit


Job Scope:

· Peptide screening - ELISA, bead-based separation etc.


· DNA/RNA analysis - primer design, PCR, qPCR, purification (spin column, magnetic beads, ethanol precipitation, phenol chloroform extraction etc.), electrophoresis (Agarose gel, Urea-PAGE), NGS(Illumina) etc.


· Protein analysis - SDS-PAGE, western blotting, ELISA etc.


Requirements

· Lead identification screening in drug discovery


· Antibody, protein or peptide engineering


· Biopanning, such as phage display, SELEX, in vitro compartmentalization, microfluidics


· RNA-related analytics, protein purification, NGS data analysis, Biomek operation, etc.


· Degree in Biomedical Science/Biochemistry/Chemical Biology/Biotechnology/Molecular Biotechnology with 1-2 years of working experience in a related field.


· Fresh graduates are welcome to apply.


Interested applicants are invited to email their detailed resume, as well as their qualifications, availability, current and expected salary to: recruitment@chugai-pharmabody.com



For more information regarding our Company, you may refer to our website at:

http://chugai-pharmabody.com/



We regret that only short-listed candidates will be notified

title: IT Specialist (Retail & Office)
raw_description:
Responsibilities

  • Provide first-line IT support for corporate office and boutique users, ensuring smooth daily operations across retail and business environments.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve hardware, software, network, and connectivity issues for end-user devices such as laptops, printers, mobile devices, and peripherals.
  • Perform user and access administration, including email, Office 365 accounts, and system permissions, in line with IT policies.
  • Support device lifecycle activities such as setup, deployment, replacement, and decommissioning for staff movements and store openings.
  • Assist with routine IT operations including system updates, patching, basic maintenance, and health monitoring under guidance from senior IT members.
  • Maintain accurate IT asset records, manage software installations and licences, and coordinate with vendors for repairs, replacements, and warranties.
  • Support basic network and infrastructure matters (LAN, Wi-Fi, VPN), and assist during boutique renovations, relocations, or IT upgrades.
  • Log, track, and document incidents and resolutions in the ticketing system, support security and compliance requirements, and provide operational support for IT projects and go-live activities.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related discipline, with 2–5 years of hands-on IT support experience.
  • Experience supporting end users in office and/or retail environments, with working knowledge of Windows/macOS, Office 365, and basic networking.
  • Familiarity with IT service desk tools, asset management, hardware/software troubleshooting, and basic IT security practices; POS system exposure is an advantage.
  • Customer-focused, organised, and dependable, with strong communication skills and the flexibility to support a fast-paced retail environment, including occasional after-hours support when required.

Please submit your updated resume in Word format by using the Apply Now Button.
We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

title: Regulatory Affairs Specialist
raw_description:
Regulatory Affairs Specialist
1 year contract, potential to renew

Come and join us!
Do you wish to work in a world-class organization trying your hands at something you have dreamt of doing?

“FIND YOUR PLACE” by joining a world-class MNC Healthcare company
Get an opportunity to explore new technology, learn new skills, enjoy the diverse and open culture, engagement and care, flexible working model, career opportunities, competitive salary and bonus, and endless amenities and benefits.

Company Description:
Our client is an MNC Healthcare company. As a focused healthcare company, with expertise in Innovative Medicine and MedTech, they are empowered to tackle the world’s toughest health challenges, innovate through science and technology, and transform patient care.

Key responsibilities:

  • The Regulatory Affairs Specialist MedTech will be a member of the local regulatory affairs department, with responsibility to support the regulatory aspects of the assigned product portfolio/s
  • Preparation of submissions to the local health authority for new products, license renewals, and variations to existing products in line with Marketing launch plans, with guidance from senior regulatory colleagues as necessary
  • Maintain departmental and source company databases of regulatory approvals
  • Complete copy and labelling review as required
  • Liaise and establish cooperative relationships with source company regulatory colleagues to ensure understanding of local regulatory requirements and request the documentation required for registration submissions
  • Build constructive relationships with the local health authority and executes Regulatory strategies in compliance with relevant laws, regulations, and organizational requirements necessary to obtain, and maintain, legal market status.
  • Maintain an awareness of new legislation, policies and guidelines impacting the assigned product portfolio
  • Contribute to continuous review and improvement of processes within the Country Regulatory Affairs (RA) department to ensure consistent, efficient and effective practices
  • Participate in discussion groups for the industry association, as required
  • Contribute to RA Team meetings to learn from colleagues, share experiences and best practice
  • Coordinate the release for supply of unapproved medical devices under the Special Access Scheme (SAS) /Special Access Importation.
  • Engage Marketing colleagues to strategize new product regulatory pathways, line extensions and changes to currently approved products and actively accelerate launch timelines.
  • Manage interactions with stakeholders and distribution centers as required to ensure product supply is not disrupted.
  • Leverages a solid working knowledge of the global regulatory environment, including proposed laws, regulations

Required Qualification and Core Competencies for the role:

  • Bachelor's degree or equivalent in Biomedical Engineering / Biomedical Sciences / Life Sciences / Pharmacy / related discipline with minimum 1 year of experience
  • Familiarity with the regulatory systems and product registration requirements in Singapore;
  • Previous experience in preparing documents for health authority submissions (Clinical Trial Application, Chemistry & Manufacturing, and or Registration dossiers) is desirable;
  • Ability to interpret complex issues and technologies and present them in simple terms to facilitate understanding by others;
  • Demonstrated ability to handle multiple projects;
  • Must be able to develop and maintain excellent working relationships, work successfully within a team environment and as an individual contributor;
  • Cultural sensitivity and ability to work and thrive in a multi-cultural environment, as well as an ability to work in a matrix environment are required;

Interested parties, please apply through this link https://jnj-apac.talent-pool.com/projects OR click on APPLY button. Alternatively, you can share your CV at joleyn.chin@randstadsourceright.com.sg

EA License: 94C3609

title: Purchasing assistant
raw_description:
Job Summary:

The Purchasing Executive supports the purchasing department in acquiring goods and services for the organization. This role involves assisting in supplier selection, placing orders, maintaining inventory levels, and ensuring that purchases are made in a timely and cost-effective manner. The ideal candidate will have strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and an understanding of procurement processes. Additionally, the candidate should be able to thrive in a fast-paced environment, effectively managing multiple tasks and meeting tight deadlines.

Key Responsibilities:

Procurement Support:

  • Assist the purchasing team in obtaining quotes and comparing prices from suppliers.
  • Help place orders for goods and services based on department requirements.
  • Monitor order status to ensure timely delivery of materials and products.
  • Track inventory levels and assist in managing reordering processes to avoid stockouts or overstocking.

Order Processing:

  • Prepare and process purchase orders (POs) for goods and services required by the organization.
  • Verify purchase order details to ensure accuracy, including product descriptions, quantities, and prices.
  • Ensure that purchase orders are approved by the appropriate personnel and delivered on time.

Documentation and Record Keeping:

  • Maintain accurate records of all purchasing transactions, including invoices, purchase orders, and receipts.
  • Assist in the preparation of purchasing reports, analyzing trends, and identifying opportunities for cost savings.

Qualifications:

  • High school diploma or equivalent (Bachelor’s degree in business, supply chain management, or a related field is preferred).
  • Proven experience in a purchasing, administrative, or supply chain role is an advantage.
  • Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, Outlook).

Skills:

  • Strong attention to detail and accuracy in processing orders and tracking inventory.
  • Good communication skills for liaising with suppliers and internal departments.
  • Excellent organizational and time-management skills, with the ability to prioritize and handle multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.
  • Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines without compromising accuracy.
  • Basic understanding of procurement and supply chain management processes.

title: TRAVEL CONSULTING
raw_description:
🌟 Position: Travel Consultant

👥 Team Culture

We are a young and dynamic team, where you will enjoy a positive and supportive work environment, along with opportunities for rapid professional growth.

📌 Responsibilities

  • Recommend and match suitable holiday destinations and travel products to meet clients’ needs and preferences, creating unforgettable experiences.
  • Handle phone calls, respond to online and in-store customer inquiries, and provide professional travel advice.
  • Manage reservations for hotels, resorts, transportation, and partner services.
  • Assist in planning and executing marketing campaigns, promotional projects, and partnership initiatives.
  • Support clients with bookings for accommodations, sightseeing activities, and itinerary arrangements.
  • Assist clients in preparing and submitting visa applications.
  • Provide prompt and efficient responses to customer inquiries through online platforms.

🎯 Requirements

  • Fresh polytechnic/college graduates are welcome to apply (prior experience in travel or sales is an advantage).
  • Strong customer service orientation and professional attitude.
  • Proficient in both Mandarin and English (spoken and written) to communicate effectively with diverse clients.
  • Familiar with and able to effectively use social media platforms (e.g., WeChat, Xiaohongshu, Instagram, Facebook, etc.).
  • Excellent communication, organizational, and teamwork skills.
  • Passionate about the travel industry and enthusiastic about sharing the joy and value of travel with clients.

Job Requirements:

  • Strong communication skills in both Chinese and English, with fluent written and spoken proficiency.
  • Prior experience in the travel and tourism industry preferred (candidates with limited experience are also welcome; training will be provided).
  • Experience in handling visa applications for European and American countries will be an advantage.
  • Strong sense of customer service, responsibility, and ability to work effectively as part of a team.
  • Quick learner with the ability to adapt and acquire knowledge of company products and operational procedures.

💡 What We Offer

  • A positive, energetic, and dynamic team culture.
  • Comprehensive on-the-job training and career development opportunities.
  • Valuable experience in engaging with a diverse customer base.
  • Opportunities to participate in travel product development and marketing initiatives.
  • Competitive salary and benefits package.

Salary Package:

  • Basic Salary: S$3,000 per month
  • Attractive commission scheme based on sales performance
  • The average salary for full-time employees is around 3500-4500.

title: Banking Sales Associate
raw_description:
Responsibilities:


1. Customer Engagement:

- Build and maintain strong relationships with customers.

- Provide excellent customer service and address inquiries regarding financial products and services.

- Actively engage in cross-selling and upselling financial products to meet sales targets.


2. Product Knowledge:

- Stay updated on the bank's products and services.

- Effectively communicate product features and benefits to customers.

- Assist customers in selecting the right banking products to meet their financial needs.


3. Sales Targets:

- Achieve and exceed monthly sales targets.

- Identify opportunities for revenue generation and actively pursue them.

- Collaborate with team members to enhance overall sales performance.


4. Documentation and Processing:

- Assist customers in completing necessary documentation for various financial transactions.

- Ensure accuracy and compliance with financial regulations in all customer interactions.

- Process the forwarding of account openings, loan applications, and other financial transactions efficiently.


5. Compliance:

- Stay informed about and adhere to all relevant banking/ financial regulations and compliance standards.

- Ensure that all customer interactions and transactions comply with internal policies and external regulations.


6. Problem Resolution:

- Address and resolve customer issues and complaints in a timely and effective manner.

- Collaborate with other departments to resolve complex customer inquiries.


7. Team Collaboration:

- Work closely with team members to achieve overall goals.

- Participate in team meetings and contribute to a positive team environment.


8. Market Research:

- Stay informed about industry trends, market conditions, and competitor offerings.

- Provide feedback to management regarding customer preferences and market demands.


9. Training and Development:

- Participate in ongoing training programs to enhance product knowledge and sales skills.

- Share insights and best practices with team members to improve overall performance.



Qualifications:

- Local diploma or A Levels; bachelor's degree in business or related field is a plus.

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills.

- Knowledge of banking products and services.

- Ability to work in a target-driven environment.

- Attention to detail and strong organizational skills.

title: Junior Sales Investment Manager
raw_description:
Job Description:

Our client is a leading top global bank seeking professional to drive business growth and build strong relationships with high-net-worth clients. You'll design and deliver customized investment solutions that address the complex needs of affluent individuals, helping them protect their assets and secure their financial future.


Key Responsibilities:

- Build and maintain relationships with high-net-worth individuals providing tailored investment strategies and solutions

- Expand the client base and meet sales targets

- Manage portfolio allocations, monitor performance, and adjust strategies as needed

- Stay informed about financial markets, industry trends, economic factors, and regulatory changes to offer up-to-date advice to clients

Requirements:

- Excellent interpersonal and communication skills

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

- Ability to work independently and as part of a team

title: Creative & Marketing Intern
raw_description:
About Us

Bandwagon is a leading music media and marketing company in Asia. We work with forward-looking brands and communities to create culturally relevant campaigns that live across digital platforms and real-world experiences.

We are looking for a driven and creative, Creative & Marketing Intern to join our team. This role sits at the intersection of creative design, content, and marketing, offering hands-on exposure to how ideas are developed, shaped, and executed across multiple touch points.

If you are passionate about visual storytelling, digital culture, and creative marketing, and want to build real-world skills beyond the classroom, this internship offers an opportunity to learn, create, and contribute meaningfully to impactful campaigns.

What You Will Do
As a Creative & Marketing Intern, you will support the creative marketing team in ideating, designing, and executing campaigns across digital and physical platforms.

You will be involved in the full creative and marketing process, from concept development and content ideation to design production and on-ground execution. This role is ideal for someone who wants to actively create, experiment, and understand how creative and marketing strategies translate into real-world outcomes.


Key Responsibilities
1. Creative & Marketing Ideation

  • Contribute to brainstorming sessions for creative campaigns, content concepts, and marketing initiatives.
  • Develop visual and conceptual ideas for digital and social media content.
  • Create mood boards, visual references, and creative directions for campaigns.
  • Translate marketing objectives into creative concepts and visual narratives.

2. Design & Content Production

  • Design visual assets for digital platforms, including social media posts, stories, posters, EDMs, and presentation decks.
  • Adapt and resize key visuals across formats and platforms.
  • Apply design principles such as layout, typography, and colour to produce visually compelling content.
  • Edit and refine creative assets to maintain visual consistency and quality.
  • Support the development of creative outputs for campaigns and activations.

3. Marketing & Campaign Execution

  • Support the planning and execution of integrated marketing campaigns across digital and physical touchpoints.
  • Assist in coordinating campaign deliverables, timelines, and creative assets.
  • Support on-ground activations and campaign rollouts where required.
  • Collaborate with creative, content, and marketing teams to ensure timely and effective execution.
  • Organise and manage campaign materials and creative assets.

4. Video & Motion Content

  • Edit short-form video content for digital platforms.
  • Create basic motion graphics and visual transitions where required.
  • Prepare video assets for social media and campaign use.
  • Explore creative approaches to visual storytelling in video formats.

5. Creative Operations & Team Support

  • Assist in preparing creative and marketing decks for internal and external use.
  • Organise design files, references, and creative assets.
  • Support ad-hoc creative and marketing tasks as required.
  • Learn and adapt to agency workflows and creative processes.


Who We’re Looking For

  • Currently pursuing or recently completed a diploma or degree in Design, Visual Communication, Marketing, Communications, Multimedia, or a related field.
  • Strong interest in creative design, visual storytelling, and digital content.
  • Working knowledge of design tools such as Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator, with familiarity in video editing tools.
  • Understanding of design fundamentals including layout, typography, and colour.
  • Comfortable translating ideas into visual and content outputs.
  • Curious, proactive, and willing to experiment with creative ideas.
  • Able to take feedback and iterate on work.
  • Organised, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.

What You’ll Gain

  • Hands-on experience across creative design, content, and marketing execution.
  • Exposure to real-world campaigns and on-ground activations.
  • Mentorship from experienced creatives and marketers.
  • Opportunities to contribute ideas and see them brought to life.
  • A strong portfolio of creative and campaign work.
  • Insight into agency workflows and creative strategy.


How to Apply
Send your CV, portfolio, and a short introduction to join@bandwagon.sg.

This internship is based in Singapore.

title: Sales Support Specialist
raw_description:
About MIJ Hub
My Inspiring Journey (MIJ) Hub is a leading and rapidly growing private school and non-governmental organization (NGO) dedicated to transforming the lives of individuals aged 4 to 40 with diverse learning needs. Through our comprehensive educational programs, vocational training, and community integration initiatives, we have been creating positive change locally for over 13 years. As we strive to be the ultimate one-stop center for the special needs community in the region, we are proud to open our first international centre, MIJ International in Kuala
Lumpur, Malaysia., At MIJ Hub, we are pioneers in innovation. By managing multiple for-profit ventures, including a food and beverage (F&B) arm, we generate sustainable income streams that allow us to provide
subsidies, ensuring parents and students have access to affordable, high-quality education. Join MIJ Hub and become part of a vibrant, dynamic team committed to driving financial sustainability, fostering inclusivity, and expanding our reach to make a real difference in the community.

Job Title: Sales Support Specialist (Part-time)
At MIJ Hub, the Sales Support Specialist plays a vital role in driving our sales function. This position offers an exciting opportunity to make a meaningful impact as an individual contributor. It’s ideal for someone who thrives in a customer-focused environment and is eager to bring their extensive retail sales experience to a dynamic and innovative team. In this role, you will drive sales across all MIJ brands, including student enrollment for MIJ Hub, securing donations, and promoting product sales from Ashraf Café and Inspo. You will engage with customers via calls, emails, and WhatsApp to close sales, upsell, and retain customers. Additionally, you will collaborate closely with our marketing team to ensure a seamless experience between our e-commerce platforms and sales efforts. You’ll also be responsible for utilizing HubSpot to manage customer data, track sales activities, and maintain accurate records.

Key Responsibilities

● Support Sales Specialist to drive sales revenue across all MIJ brands, focusing on donations and product sales 
● Utilize HubSpot to manage customer data, track sales activities, and maintain accurate Records.
prepare sales materials, and ensure a seamless customer journey.
● Coordinate with other departments to support smooth and efficient sales operations.
● Address customer inquiries, resolve issues, and maintain high levels of satisfaction.
● Hands-on experience with CMS platforms, including Payload, to support smooth
integration between marketing and sales workflows.
●Strong experimentation mindset, comfortable testing variations in messaging, offers, and channels to identify what drives higher engagement and conversions.

Requirements
● Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Communications, or a related field.
● Exceptional interpersonal skills with a talent for building rapport and fostering long-term customer relationships.
● Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills, adept at engaging with customers across calls, emails, and WhatsApp.

● Proven ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.
● Strong problem-solving skills with a proactive approach to addressing customer needs and concerns.
● Experience with CRM systems (preferably HubSpot), and a good grasp of digital tools to track and manage customer interactions.
● Ability to work closely with cross-functional teams, particularly marketing, to enhance customer engagement and drive sales. 

Able to commit as 3 days in a week from 9am to 4pm.

title: Junior Product Manager
raw_description:
Industry: Computer Printer Manufacturing
Location: Alexandra Road
﻿Basic + Allowance + AWS + VB

﻿Responsibilities: 

  • Work closely with regional sales companies to achieve sales and other set targets
  • Monitor regional Sell-in/Sell-out/Sell-Through situation to ensure healthy sales and inventory situation
  • Monitor market activities and market share data including competitors to derive appropriate market strategies
  • Conduct market research and translate consumer and technology trends into sound business decisions
  • Understanding consumer needs and behavioral patterns to identify appropriate products/services for different segments, influencing overall product road map
  • Key person responsible for new product launch, including developing appropriate product and pricing strategy, working closely with internal stakeholders on product training and implementation of effective market communication to end-users
  • Plan relevant support activities with effective return on investment on money spent
  • Manage product life cycle from pre-launch to end of life
  • Develop and adapt pricing strategy based on internal and external trends
  • Formulate appropriate Go-To-Market strategies to support individual regional sales companies achieve business targets

﻿Requirements: 

  • Ideally 1-2 years of relevant experience in the Printer, Consumer Electronics, or IT industry.
  • A Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
  • Strong analytical skills: data-driven and comfortable with numbers.
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills for working with regional teams.
  • Effective problem-solving abilities to assess situations and develop proposals.
  • High integrity and ability to handle confidential product, pricing, and budget information.
  • Self-disciplined, time-conscious, and able to work independently to meet deadlines.
  • A passion for technology and IT products is a plus.

All Successful candidates can expect a very competitive remuneration package and a comprehensive range of benefits.

title: Marketing and Event Executive
raw_description:
We are looking for a creative, hands-on Marketing Executiveto support K.STAR’s brand growth, promotions, and customer engagement.

This role works closely with the Founder and Operations Teamto execute marketing campaigns, manage content, and strengthen K.STAR’s premiumentertainment brand across digital and offline touchpoints.

Key Responsibilities:

Brand & Content Marketing      

Execute KSTAR brand messaging across social media, Website and in-store materials.

Assit in Content creation including:

  • Short media posts
  • Short-form video
  • Poster and visual assets
  • Caption EDMs and simpler Copywriting

Social Media & Digital Marketing

Manage daily content posting on platforms such as

  •  Instagram/Tikrok/Xiaohongshu(RED)/Wechat
  • Monitor engagement, comments, DMs and customer interactions
  • Support  digital marketing initiative including:
  • paid advertisementsPromotionsand influencer KOL collaborations (if any)

Campaigns & Promotions

Support marketing Campaigns for:

  • Membership promotions
  • Corporate Clients & events
  • Seasonal festive campaigns 
  • Assist in on-ground promotion and event execution

Corporate & Partnershipsupport 

  • Prepare simple marketing material for corporate Clients (PDF decks, visuals, post)

Support branding:

  •  Corporate eventsTeam-building activitiesand private functions.Assist in partnership and collaboration marketing initiatives.

Performance Tracking

  • Track basic marketing metrics such as
  • ReachEngagement Leads
  • Bookings
  • Andprepare simple reports and insights for continuous improvement.


Qualifications:

  • Diploma or bachelor’s degree in marketing, Mass Communications, Medial or related field.1 – 3 year experience (Fresh graduates with relevant internships of portfolio may considered)
  • Familiar with Instagram, TikTok, Xiaohongshu (RED), and WeChat
  • Basic content creation skills (copywriting, short videos, simple visuals)
  • Comfortable using tools like Canva, CapCut, or similar
  • Good communication skills
  • Hands-on, proactive, and able to work in a fast-paced environment
  • Flexibility to work irregular hours, including evenings and weekends, as required for events.

raw_description:
Job Responsibilities:

  • Address and resolve database incidents promptly to minimize downtime.
  • Monitor events, handle alerts, and manage database outages to restore services quickly.
  • Process service requests for database changes and enhancements.
  • Perform root cause analysis to prevent recurring database issues.
  • Support the implementation of standard and custom database builds.
  • Provide operational support for HANA and MS-SQL databases.
  • Ensure adherence to backup and recovery processes.
  • Optimize database performance and manage alert monitoring.
  • Decommission systems/servers following proper protocols as needed.

  • Bachelor’s degree or equivalent in Computer Science or related field
  • Strong experience with Oracle or SQL DBA and MS-SQL databases.
  • 2 - 5 years of experience in database administration, with a focus on Oracle or SQL DBA .
  • Bachelor's Degree / Diploma in Computer Engineering or any related field.
  • Proficiency in RDBMS management and administration.
  • Knowledge of backup, recovery, and decommissioning processes.
  • Experience in incident management and database performance optimization in a 24x7 environment.
  • Experience managing database outages and coordinating effective recovery.
  • Familiarity with alert monitoring and performance optimization.
  • Strong problem-solving and troubleshooting abilities.
  • Ability to work under pressure in a 24x7 support environment.
  • Effective communication skills for incident and service request management.
  • Prior experience in 24x7 operational support.

title: JOB ALERT: WANTED - TECH ROCKSTARS OF TOMORROW 🚀
raw_description:
Stop looking for a job. Start building a career.

Yo, fresh grad! Tired of boring corporate graduate programmes?
Want to actually use your brain and see your hustle turn into real cash and a leadership role? Read on.

For 18 years, Esmegen has been the behind-the-scenes tech hero for Singapore businesses. 
We do the cybersecurity, cloud, and connectivity stuff that keeps companies running. Cool? Cool. Now, we need the next generation to take the stage.

THE GIG: FUTURE LEADERS ACCELERATOR

No experience? Perfect. We want your hunger, not your resume.

Here’s the deal in 3 acts:

ACT I: BECOME A TECH WIZARD (MONTHS 1-12)

We PAY to turn you into a certified expert. No boring lectures.

  • 🧠 Get Schooled & Certified: We’ll load you up with official badges from Microsoft, Acronis, and more. (Think of it like levelling up in a game, but for your career.)
  • 🎯 Learn from the Front Lines: You’ll be right beside me (the Head of Sales) on actual client calls. No fetching coffee. Just learning how tech solves real business drama.
  • 🛡️ Master the Triple Threat: 
    1) Cybersecurity (stop the hackers!),
    2) Cloud Voice (make businesses talk!),
    3) Telco (connect everything!). Be the Swiss Army knife of tech.

ACT II: RUN YOUR OWN SHOW (MONTHS 3-12)

Time to fly solo (with a safety net).

  • 💼 Get Your Own Client Squad: Build relationships. Solve problems. Be the hero.
  • 📈 Earn Like a Boss: Here’s the real talk: Base salary + UNCAPPED PERFORMANCE REWARDS. Your hustle = your wallet.
  • 🧭 Weekly Game Plans: Not micromanaging. We do weekly syncs to strategize, overcome obstacles, and crush your goals.

ACT III: BECOME A LEADER (12+ MONTHS)

This is the prize. One of you will step up as Head of Your Own Pod.

  • 👑 Fast-Track to Head of Pod: Based on clear, fair play: who learns fastest, helps teammates most, and gets results.
  • 🧑‍🏫 Build Your Own Tribe: Mentor new recruits. Shape our culture. Get your hands on strategy.
  • 🏆 Earn the Stripes: Lead a pod. Earn more. Make a real impact.

WHO WE'RE STALKING (ER, LOOKING FOR):

  • Singaporean/ PR fresh grads from Uni, Poly, or ITE. 
  • The human equivalent of a “can-do” attitude. Grit > grades.
  • A natural connector who can explain tech to your grandma.
  • Someone who sees a challenge and thinks “Let’s go!” not “Is this in my job description?”

WHAT YOU ABSOLUTELY WILL NOT DO:

  • ❌ Mindless cold-calling from a dusty list.
  • ❌ Pushing products you don’t understand.
  • ❌ Being just a number in a giant, soulless corporation.

WHAT YOU ABSOLUTELY WILL GET:

  • ✅ A career launchpad in Singapore’s hottest industry (tech!).
  • ✅ A portfolio of skills and certs that makes you future-proof.
  • ✅ A mentor (hi!) who’s invested in your win.
  • ✅ A seat at the table in a stable, 18-year-old company.
  • ✅ A clear shot at leadership in 12-18 months if you bring the fire.

THINK YOU'VE GOT THE JUICE? PROVE IT.

Our 3-Step Play:

  1. The First Pass: Send your resume.
    Tell us in 2 sentences why you're bored of ordinary.
  2. The Hustle Round: You’ll get a case study to prep.
    We’ll talk it through. Show us your thinking, not just a textbook answer.
  3. The Final Call: A real conversation.
    Let’s see if we’re the right rocket fuel for your career.

We’re building a team of A-players. Not a team of order-takers.

READY TO LEVEL UP?

Intake Starts: 1st March 2026
Positions: 4 (1 future Head of Pod will emerge. Will it be you?)

Apply Here: david.lim@esmegen.com with subject: “Tech Rockstar”

Esmegen is an equal opportunity employer. We don’t care about your background, only your future. Bring your authentic self.

P.S. If you read this far and got excited, you’re probably our kind of person. Apply now. Your future self will thank you. ✌️

title: AI Research Scientist
raw_description:
About Bitdeer:

Bitdeer Technologies Group (Nasdaq: BTDR) is a leader in the blockchain and high-performance computing industry. It is one of the world’s largest holders of proprietary hash rate and suppliers of hash rate. Bitdeer is committed to providing comprehensive computing solutions for its customers.

Headquartered in Singapore, Bitdeer has deployed mining data centers in the United States, Norway, and Bhutan. It offers specialized mining infrastructure, high-quality hash rate sharing products, and reliable hosting services to global users. The company also offers advanced cloud capabilities for customers with high demands for artificial intelligence.

About Bitdeer AI Lab:

Bitdeer AI Lab is a frontier AI Lab under Bitdeer, a global-leading computing power solutions provider. We will focus on two core missions: First, effectively transforming energy into intelligence; second, pushing the limits of intelligence by redefining AI architectures to achieve human-level learning efficiency and reasoning capabilities. Our vision is to create intelligence that learns like humans do: efficiently, adaptively, and recursively, transforming finite parameters into unbounded potential.

Our lab is equipped with thousands of cutting-edge GPUs dedicated to AI research, and we are committed to continuously investing in and expanding our computational infrastructure to support research in artificial intelligence.

Job Summary:

We are looking for key talents to develop in the following areas

  • LLM Area (Large-scale language model pre-training)
  • Reinforcement learning for reasoning models
  • Advanced AI systems (Data construction, curation, and engineering for large-scale model training )

Our ideal candidate:

  • Fresh graduates (Bachelors, Masters, PhD) from all disciplines and/or candidates with up to 2 years of related work experience.
  • Strong background in the LLM era with hands-on experience in: Large-scale language model pre-training (preferably 3B+ parameter models with 500B+ token datasets)
  • Reinforcement learning for reasoning models and advanced AI systems - Data construction, curation, and engineering for large-scale model training
  • Understanding of distributed training, scaling laws, and optimization techniques （I）Deep passion for cutting-edge AI technologies and research （II）Impressive personal achievements in academics, research projects, internships, or demonstrated expertise in AI/ML domains
  • Most importantly: driven to create meaningful impact early in your career, with strong ownership mentality, accountability, and unwavering commitment to pursuing excellence in AI research

What you will experience working with us:

  • A culture that values authenticity and diversity of thoughts and backgrounds;
  • An inclusive and respectable environment with open workspaces and exciting start-up spirit;
  • Fast-growing company with the chance to network with industrial pioneers and enthusiasts;
  • Ability to contribute directly and make an impact on the future of the digital asset industry;
  • Involvement in new projects, developing processes/systems;
  • Personal accountability, autonomy, fast growth, and learning opportunities;
  • Attractive welfare benefits and developmental opportunities such as training and mentoring.

title: Logistics Coordinator
raw_description:
#Sales Admin #Logistics #Data #Operations #Warehouse #Car Accessories

Salary Package: SGD1800 - SGD3500 commensurate with experience

Job Location: Singapore West Lok Yang, near Pioneer MRT Station

Job Types: Permanent, Full time, Onsite, 5 days

Business Sector: Automotive Accessories Distribution, Wholesale, Customization & Solutions Provider

Prior experience in Automotive Industry logistics or operations is preferred; however, motivated fresh graduates with a strong willingness to learn are welcome to apply!

Job Responsibilities:

Data Processing & Coordination:

  • Liaise with operations and warehouse teams to ensure accurate data processing.

  • Receive stock checklists and load items to the store using a trolley.

  • Prioritize and allocate pick-and-pass picking orders to courier service companies for efficient export and local deliveries.

  • Update information into the system in a timely manner.

  • Perform any other warehouse administrative duties as assigned.

Store Management:

  • Oversee the management of store operations and inventory.

Inventory Management:

  • Oversee inventory levels of car accessories, ensuring adequate stock to meet customer demand.

  • Track product movement and forecast inventory needs based on sales trends.

  • Maintain accurate records of stock, monitor stock rotation, and manage stock replenishment.

Order Processing & Fulfillment:

  • Ensure accurate and timely processing of customer orders, both online and in-store.

  • Coordinate the preparation, packaging, and shipping of products.

  • Work with suppliers to ensure timely delivery of car accessories.

Logistics Coordination:

  • Coordinate with shipping companies and logistics providers for the delivery of products.

  • Track the status of deliveries and resolve any issues related to shipment delays or errors.

Sales Support:

  • Collaborate closely with the sales team to understand customer needs and ensure product availability.

Customer Service:

  • Address customer queries related to order status, shipping, and product availability.

  • Monitor returns and exchanges, ensuring proper handling in line with store policies.

Data Analysis & Reporting:

  • Monitor and report on inventory levels and fulfillment rates.

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent, Fresh graduate

Work Location: In person

Benefits:

  • Additional leave

  • Free parking

  • Professional development

title: English Teacher (Primary) [Early-Career / Fresh Graduates Welcome]
raw_description:
About the Role

At illum.e, we are not ‘just another tuition centre’. We are a premium English education brand known for clarity of method, depth of thinking, and consistently strong student outcomes.

This role is designed specifically for newly-graduated educators or tutors with limited formal classroom experience who want to be trained properly, mentored closely, and developed into confident, high-impact English teachers. If you have mainly done 1-to-1 private tutoring, this role offers the structure, support, and pedagogy to help you scale your teaching skill professionally.

You will focus primarily on teaching excellence and classroom delivery, while being gradually introduced to curriculum thinking through guided exposure — not thrown into the deep end.

Teaching locations will also be based on our five branches - Jurong East, Bukit Timah, Novena, Hougang and Marine Parade.

Key Responsibilities

Teaching & Classroom Delivery

  • Deliver illum.e’s Primary English lessons using our structured lesson plans, materials, and teaching frameworks

  • Build students’ confidence, clarity of expression, and examination readiness through guided practice and feedback

  • Learn to manage small-group classrooms effectively, even if your prior experience has been mostly 1-to-1

Pedagogical Development (Training-Focused)

  • Undergo structured in-house training in lesson delivery, questioning techniques, explanation clarity, and marking standards

  • Observe experienced teachers, co-teach where appropriate, and receive regular feedback on your teaching

  • Develop strong fundamentals in grammar teaching, writing instruction, and comprehension strategies

Student Progress & Support

  • Monitor student understanding during lessons and flag learning gaps to Leads

  • Apply feedback from mentors to refine your teaching and communication week by week

Light Curriculum Exposure (Supported)

  • Support minor curriculum refinement tasks (e.g. improving worksheets, suggesting clarifications) under guidance

  • No expectation to independently design full curricula or assessments at this stage

Who We’re Looking For

  • Fresh graduates or early-career educators with a strong command of English

  • Tutors with mainly 1-to-1 private tutoring experience who want to grow into classroom teaching

  • Clear communicators who enjoy explaining ideas simply and precisely

  • Coachable, reflective, and genuinely eager to improve as teachers

  • Prior MOE or centre experience is welcome but not required

Why illum.e?

Serious Training, Not Sink-or-Swim
You are not expected to ‘already know everything’. We invest time in grooming you into a confident, structured, and respected educator.

Strong Brand, Real Demand
Students come to illum.e because of trust, results, and reputation — not aggressive sales.

Excellent Teaching Support
You teach with well-designed materials, clear lesson objectives, and marking guidance — not last-minute scrambling.

Low Politics, High Standards
A professional culture focused on growth, clarity, and doing the work well.

Clear Growth Pathways
Strong performers can progress into senior teaching roles, curriculum tracks, or academic leadership over time.

Future-Facing Organisation
Exposure to AI-assisted learning tools, digital platforms, and long-term expansion plans — without pressure to ‘perform tech’.

Staff Benefits

  • Competitive salary with annual reviews

  • Semester-based performance bonuses and retention incentives

  • Paid training sessions, lesson observations, and curriculum workshops

  • Full curriculum and marking support

  • Mentorship from experienced Teaching and Curriculum Leads

  • Direct access to Academic Directors and senior leadership

  • Two full rest days per week

  • Flexible scheduling based on teaching availability

  • Annual retreats, festive gatherings, and wellness initiatives

title: Pricing Analyst- Asia Pacific Region
raw_description:
Requisition ID:
Job Location: Singapore – Jurong Island

To submit application, please click below posting link or copy and paste to a new browser:  

https://chevron.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com/jobs/job/Singapore-Central-Singapore-Singapore/Pricing-Analyst--Asia-Pacific-Region_R000068660

Responsibilities for this position may include but are not limited to:

The Pricing Analyst position plays a critical role in supporting profitability, margin optimization, and sustainable growth within the Asia Pacific region. This role is responsible for executing, and continuously improving pricing strategies, tools, and processes that respond to market dynamics, cost structures, and customer needs. The position works closely with Sales, Finance, Supply Chain, Optimization, and other internal stakeholders to ensure pricing decisions are analytically sound, operationally effective, and strategically aligned.

Responsibilities for this position may include but are not limited to:

  • Support the execution of pricing strategies across the Asia Pacific region by delivering data‑driven insights and pricing recommendations aligned with customer needs, market dynamics, and cost drivers to the Regional Sales team.

  • Work closely with the Sales team, the role analyzes pricing data, monitors market and cost conditions, and supports day‑to‑day pricing decisions to help achieve margin and volume objectives.

title: Excavation Tool Engineer
raw_description:
As an Excavation Tool Engineer, you will be responsible for ensuring the optimal performance, maintenance, and analysis of excavation tools used in various projects. Your role will focus on tool refurbishment, inventory management, and technical support for HAQ projects.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Assist in collating the cutterhead intervention reports and geological reports from projects for analysis
  • Preparing the cutter refurbishment reports for clients with accompanying photos and assist in the analysis of spare excavation tool performance for Herrenknecht projects
  • Assist in managing spare excavation tool common stock inventory for Herrenknecht projects
  • Assist in training cutter mechanics on the cutter refurbishment procedure and perform quality control (QC) checks on the tools and equipment at the cutter workshop to ensure they meet all standards
  • Manage the maintenance and inventory of cutter workshop equipment (i.e. hydraulic presses, induction heaters, special tools, lifting devices, oil exchange system, etc)
  • Perform other duties as assigned by your supervisor, including supporting ad-hoc project requirements, troubleshooting, or other tasks that may arise

Job Requirements:

  • Master/ Degree / Diploma in Mechanical Engineering
  • Some knowledge of Tunnel Boring Machine (TBM) technology would be good but not necessary
  • Fresh graduate may apply as training will be provided
  • Ideal candidate should be a fast learner and industrious
  • Possess good interpersonal and effective communication skill
  • An excellent team player who can also work well independently with minimum supervision and results-oriented in a fast-paced environment
  • Good computer literacy skills with software, like Microsoft and/or windows applications
